reservation.ToDTO());\n    }\n\n    [HttpPut(\"{id:int}\")]\n    [Authorize(Roles = \"Admin,Manager\")]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<ReservationDTO>> Put(int id, [FromBody] ReservationInputDTO model)\n    {\n        if (model.Id != 0 && model.Id != id) return BadRequest();\n\n        var reservation = await _dbContext.Reservations\n            .Include(r => r.Player)\n            .Include(r => r.Table)\n            .FirstOrDefaultAsync(r => r.Id == id);\n\n        if (reservation is null) return NotFound();\n\n        if (!await _dbContext.Players.AnyAsync(p => p.Id == model.PlayerId))\n        {\n            ModelState.AddModelError(nameof(model.PlayerId), \"Igrač ne postoji\");\n        }\n        if (!await _dbContext.Tables.AnyAsync(t => t.Id == model.TableId))\n        {\n System.Security.Claims;\nusing System.Text.Encodings.Web;\nusing aspnet.Data;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Hosting;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Testing;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Infrastructure;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.Extensions;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Options;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Pokreće stvarnu aplikaciju s InMemory bazom (jedinstvenom po factory instanci)\n/// i test autentikacijskom shemom upravljanom preko \"X-Test-Role\" headera.\n/// </summary>\npublic class CasinoApiFactory : WebApplicationFactory<Program>\n{\n    private readonly string _dbName = $\"CasinoTests-{Guid.NewGuid()}\";\n\n    protected override void ConfigureWebHost(IWebHostBuilder builder)\n    {\n        builder.UseEnvironment(\"Testing\");\n\n        builder.ConfigureAppConfiguration((_, config) =>\n        {\n            config.AddInMemoryCollection(new Dictionary<string, string?>\n            {\n                [\"ConnectionStrings:DefaultConnection\"] = \"TestConnection\"\n            });\n        });\n\n        builder.ConfigureServices(services =>\n        {\n            // SQL Server registraciju zamijeniti InMemory bazom\n            services.RemoveAll(typeof(DbContextOptions<CasinoDbContext>));\n            services.RemoveAll(typeof(IDbContextOptionsConfiguration<CasinoDbContext>));\n\n            services.AddDbContext<CasinoDbContext>(options =>\n                options.UseInMemoryDatabase(_dbName));\n\n            // Test autentikacija umjesto Identity cookieja\n            services.AddAuthentication()\n                .AddScheme<AuthenticationSchemeOptions, TestAuthHandler>(TestAuthHandler.SchemeName, _ => { });\n\n            services.PostConfigure<AuthenticationOptions>(options =>\n            {\n                options.DefaultAuthenticateScheme = TestAuthHandler.SchemeName;\n                options.DefaultChallengeScheme = TestAuthHandler.SchemeName;\n            });\n        });\n    }\n}\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Autenticira zahtjev samo ako sadrži \"X-Test-Role\" header; bez headera vraća 401.\n/// </summary>\npublic class TestAuthHandler : AuthenticationHandler<AuthenticationSchemeOptions>\n{\n    public const string SchemeName = \"Test\";\n    public const string RoleHeader = \"X-Test-Role\";\n\n    public TestAuthHandler(\n        IOptionsMonitor<AuthenticationSchemeOptions> options,\n        ILoggerFactory logger,\n        UrlEncoder encoder)\n        : base(options, logger, encoder)\n    {\n    }\n\n    protected override Task<AuthenticateResult> HandleAuthenticateAsync()\n    {\n        if (!Request.Headers.TryGetValue(RoleHeader, out var role) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(role))\n        {\n            return Task.FromResult(AuthenticateResult.NoResult());\n        }\n\n        var claims = new[]\n        {\n            new Claim(ClaimTypes.Name, \"test-user\"),\n            new Claim(ClaimTypes.Role, role.ToString())\n        };\n\n        var identity = new ClaimsIdentity(claims, SchemeName);\n        var ticket = new AuthenticationTicket(new ClaimsPrincipal(identity), SchemeName);\n\n        return Task.FromResult(AuthenticateResult.Success(ticket));\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_012HR8XCfjQvmthQHp9WLcR2"}

{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet.Tests/ApiTestBase.cs","content":"using aspnet.Data;\nusing aspnet.Models;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\npublic abstract class ApiTestBase : IClassFixture<CasinoApiFactory>\n{\n    protected readonly CasinoApiFactory Factory;\n\n    /// Klijent bez autentikacije\n    protected readonly HttpClient Client;\n\n    /// Klijent s rolom Admin\n    protected readonly HttpClient AdminClient;\n\n    /// Klijent s rolom Manager\n    protected readonly HttpClient ManagerClient;\n\n    protected ApiTestBase(CasinoApiFactory factory)\n    {\n        Factory = factory;\n        Client = factory.CreateClient();\n\n        AdminClient = factory.CreateClient();\n        AdminClient.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add(TestAuthHandler.RoleHeader, \"Admin\");\n\n        ManagerClient = factory.CreateClient();\n        ManagerClient.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add(TestAuthHandler.RoleHeader, \"Manager\");\n    }\n\n    protected async Task<T> WithDbAsync<T>(Func<CasinoDbContext, Task<T>> action)\n    {\n        using var scope = Factory.Services.CreateScope();\n        var dbContext = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<CasinoDbContext>();\n        return await action(dbContext);\n    }\n\n    // ── Pomoćne metode za pripremu podataka ──────────────────────────────────\n\n    protected Task<Casino> CreateCasinoAsync() => WithDbAsync(async db =>\n    {\n        var casino = new Casino\n        {\n            Name = $\"Test Casino {Guid.NewGuid():N}\",\n            Address = \"Testna ulica 1, Zagreb\",\n            LicenseNumber = $\"HR-TST-{Random.Shared.Next(1000, 9999)}\",\n            FoundedDate = new DateTime(2015, 1, 1)\n        };\n        db.Casinos.Add(casino);\n        await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        return casino;\n    });\n\n    protected Task<Game> CreateGameAsync() => WithDbAsync(async db =>\n    {\n        var game = new Game\n        {\n            Name = $\"Test Game {Guid.NewGuid():N}\",\n            Type = GameType.Blackjack,\n            MinBet = 10,\n            MaxBet = 500,\n            Description = \"Testna igra\"\n        };\n        db.Games.Add(game);\n        await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        return game;\n    });\n\n    protected Task<Player> CreatePlayerAsync() => WithDbAsync(async db =>\n    {\n        var player = new Player\n        {\n            FirstName = \"Test\",\n            LastName = $\"Player {Guid.NewGuid():N}\",\n            Email = $\"test-{Guid.NewGuid():N}@mail.com\",\n            DateOfBirth = new DateTime(1990, 1, 1),\n            Balance = 1000\n        };\n        db.Players.Add(player);\n        await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        return player;\n    });\n\n    protected async Task<Employee> CreateEmployeeAsync(int? casinoId = null)\n    {\n        casinoId ??= (await CreateCasinoAsync()).Id;\n        return await WithDbAsync(async db =>\n        {\n            var employee = new Employee\n            {\n                FirstName = \"Test\",\n                LastName = $\"Employee {Guid.NewGuid():N}\",\n                Position = \"Dealer\",\n                CasinoId = casinoId.Value\n            };\n            db.Employees.Add(employee);\n            await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n            return employee;\n        });\n    }\n\n    protected async Task<Table> CreateTableAsync(int? casinoId = null, int? gameId = null)\n    {\n        casinoId ??= (await CreateCasinoAsync()).Id;\n        gameId ??= (await CreateGameAsync()).Id;\n        return await WithDbAsync(async db =>\n        {\n            var table = new Table\n            {\n                TableNumber = Random.Shared.Next(1, 1000),\n                IsAvailable = true,\n                MinBet = 10,\n                MaxBet = 500,\n                CasinoId = casinoId.Value,\n                GameId = gameId.Value\n            };\n            db.Tables.Add(table);\n            await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n            return table;\n        });\n    }\n\n    protected async Task<Transaction> CreateTransactionAsync(int? playerId = null)\n    {\n        playerId ??= (await CreatePlayerAsync()).Id;\n        return await WithDbAsync(async db =>\n        {\n            var transaction = new Transaction\n            {\n                Amount = 100,\n                Type = TransactionType.Deposit,\n                CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 5, 1),\n                PlayerId = playerId.Value\n            };\n            db.Transactions.Add(transaction);\n            await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n            return transaction;\n        });\n    }\n\n    protected async Task<Reservation> CreateReservationAsync(int? playerId = null, int? tableId = null)\n    {\n        playerId ??= (await CreatePlayerAsync()).Id;\n        tableId ??= (await CreateTableAsync()).Id;\n        return await WithDbAsync(async db =>\n        {\n            var reservation = new Reservation\n            {\n                ReservedAt = new DateTime(2024, 6, 1, 20, 0, 0),\n                PlayerId = playerId.Value,\n                TableId = tableId.Value\n            };\n            db.Reservations.Add(reservation);\n            await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n            return reservation;\n        });\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_0159ZawEnAzwTHeN74C4UdNY"}

{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet.Tests/CasinoApiTests.cs","content":"using aspnet.Models.DTO;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\npublic class CasinoApiTests : ApiTestBase\n{\n    public CasinoApiTests(CasinoApiFactory factory) : base(factory) { }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_ShouldReturnOkWithCollection()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/casino\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<CasinoDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().NotBeNull();\n        dtos.Should().Contain(c => c.Id == casino.Id && c.Name == casino.Name);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_WithQuery_ShouldFilterResults()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n        await CreateCasinoAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/casino?q={casino.LicenseNumber}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<CasinoDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().OnlyContain(c => c.LicenseNumber == casino.LicenseNumber);\n        dtos.Should().HaveCount(1);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturnCasino_WhenExists()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/casino/{casino.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<CasinoDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().Be(casino.Id);\n        dto.Name.Should().Be(casino.Name);\n        dto.Address.Should().Be(casino.Address);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/casino/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldCreateCasino_AndReturn201()\n    {\n        var model = new CasinoInputDTO\n        {\n            Name = \"Novi Casino\",\n            Address = \"Nova adresa 5, Osijek\",\n            LicenseNumber = \"HR-NEW-100\",\n            FoundedDate = new DateTime(2020, 3, 1)\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/casino\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Created);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<CasinoDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().BeGreaterThan(0);\n        dto.Name.Should().Be(model.Name);\n\n        var exists = await WithDbAsync(db => Task.FromResult(db.Casinos.Any(c => c.Id == dto.Id)));\n        exists.Should().BeTrue();\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn400_WhenModelInvalid()\n    {\n        var model = new { Address = \"Bez naziva 1\" };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/casino\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn401_WhenAnonymous()\n    {\n        var model = new CasinoInputDTO\n        {\n            Name = \"Anonimni Casino\",\n            Address = \"Adresa 1\",\n            LicenseNumber = \"HR-ANON-1\",\n            FoundedDate = new DateTime(2020, 1, 1)\n        };\n\n        var response = await Client.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/casino\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldUpdateCasino()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n        var model = new CasinoInputDTO\n        {\n            Id = casino.Id,\n            Name = \"Izmijenjeni naziv\",\n            Address = casino.Address,\n            LicenseNumber = casino.LicenseNumber,\n            FoundedDate = casino.FoundedDate\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync($\"/api/casino/{casino.Id}\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<CasinoDTO>();\n        dto!.Name.Should().Be(\"Izmijenjeni naziv\");\n\n        var dbName = await WithDbAsync(db => Task.FromResult(db.Casinos.Find(casino.Id)!.Name));\n        dbName.Should().Be(\"Izmijenjeni naziv\");\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var model = new CasinoInputDTO\n        {\n            Name = \"Nepostojeći\",\n            Address = \"Adresa 1\",\n            LicenseNumber = \"HR-X-1\",\n            FoundedDate = new DateTime(2020, 1, 1)\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync(\"/api/casino/999999\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldReturn400_WhenIdMismatch()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n        var model = new CasinoInputDTO\n        {\n            Id = casino.Id + 1,\n            Name = \"Mismatch\",\n            Address = \"Adresa 1\",\n            LicenseNumber = \"HR-X-2\",\n            FoundedDate = new DateTime(2020, 1, 1)\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync($\"/api/casino/{casino.Id}\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldRemoveCasino_AndReturn204()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.DeleteAsync($\"/api/casino/{casino.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NoContent);\n        var exists = await WithDbAsync(db => Task.FromResult(db.Casinos.Any(c => c.Id == casino.Id)));\n        exists.Should().BeFalse();\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await AdminClient.DeleteAsync(\"/api/casino/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldReturn403_WhenManager()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n\n        var response = await ManagerClient.DeleteAsync($\"/api/casino/{casino.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Forbidden);\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_011QduQ1AneP5eGtHusdTCBs"}

response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<GameDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().Contain(g => g.Id == game.Id && g.Name == game.Name);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_WithQuery_ShouldFilterResults()\n    {\n        var game = await CreateGameAsync();\n        await CreateGameAsync();\n\n        var dto.Type.Should().Be(game.Type.ToString());\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await Description = \"Opis nove igre\"\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/game\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Created);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<GameDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().BeGreaterThan(0);\n        dto.Type.Should().Be(\"Roulette\");\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn400_WhenModelInvalid()\n    {\n        // MinBet izvan dopuštenog raspona i bez naziva\n        var model = new { MinBet = 0, MaxBet = 100 };\n\n        var response = await response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Put_ShouldUpdateGame()\n    {\n        var game = await CreateGameAsync();\n        var model = new GameInputDTO\n        {\n            Id = game.Id,\n            Name = \"Izmijenjena igra\",\n            Type = game.Type,\n            MinBet = 25,\n            MaxBet = 750,\n            Description = game.Description\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PutAsJsonAsync($\"/api/game/{game.Id}\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<GameDTO>();\n        dto!.Name.Should().Be(\"Izmijenjena igra\");\n        dto.MinBet.Should().Be(25);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async {"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet.Tests/EmployeeApiTests.cs","content":"using aspnet.Models.DTO;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\npublic class EmployeeApiTests : ApiTestBase\n{\n    public EmployeeApiTests(CasinoApiFactory factory) : base(factory) { }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_ShouldReturnOkWithCollection()\n    {\n        var employee = await CreateEmployeeAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/employee\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<EmployeeDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().Contain(e => e.Id == employee.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_WithCasinoFilter_ShouldFilterResults()\n    {\n        var employee = await CreateEmployeeAsync();\n        await CreateEmployeeAsync(); // drugi casino\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/employee?casinoId={employee.CasinoId}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dtos = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<List<EmployeeDTO>>();\n        dtos.Should().HaveCount(1);\n        dtos![0].Id.Should().Be(employee.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturnEmployeeWithNestedCasino_WhenExists()\n    {\n        var employee = await CreateEmployeeAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync($\"/api/employee/{employee.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.OK);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<EmployeeDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().Be(employee.Id);\n        dto.Casino.Should().NotBeNull();\n        dto.Casino!.Id.Should().Be(employee.CasinoId);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetById_ShouldReturn404_WhenMissing()\n    {\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/employee/999999\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldCreateEmployee_AndReturn201()\n    {\n        var casino = await CreateCasinoAsync();\n        var model = new EmployeeInputDTO\n        {\n            FirstName = \"Novi\",\n            LastName = \"Djelatnik\",\n            Position = \"Cashier\",\n            CasinoId = casino.Id\n        };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/employee\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.Created);\n        var dto = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<EmployeeDTO>();\n        dto!.Id.Should().BeGreaterThan(0);\n        dto.Casino!.Id.Should().Be(casino.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn400_WhenCasinoMissing()\n    {\n        var model Post_ShouldReturn400_WhenModelInvalid()\n    {\n        var model = new { Position = \"Cashier\", CasinoId = 1 };\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/employee\", model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.BadRequest);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Post_ShouldReturn401_WhenAnonymous()\n    {\n        var casino = await employee.Id,\n            FirstName = \"Izmijenjeni\",\n            LastName = employee.LastName,\n            Position = \"Manager\",\n            CasinoId = employee.CasinoId\n        };\n\n model);\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NotFound);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Delete_ShouldRemoveEmployee_AndReturn204()\n    {\n        var employee = await CreateEmployeeAsync();\n\n        var response = await AdminClient.DeleteAsync($\"/api/employee/{employee.Id}\");\n\n        response.StatusCode.Should().Be(HttpStatusCode.NoContent);\n        var exists = await WithDbAsync(db => Task.FromResult(db.Employees.Any(e => e.Id == employee.Id)));\n        exists.Should().BeFalse();\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task aspnet.Models.DTO;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Tests;\n\npublic class TableApiTests : ApiTestBase\n{\n    public TableApiTests(CasinoApiFactory factory) : base(factory) { }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task GetAll_ShouldReturnOkWithCollection()\n    {\n        var table = await CreateTableAsync();\n\n        var response = await Client.GetAsync(\"/api/table\");\n\n dto.Casino.Should().NotBeNull();\n        dto.Game.Should().NotBeNull();\n        dto.Casino!.Id.Should().Be(table.CasinoId);\n        dto.Game!.Id.Should().Be(table.GameId);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n     var game = await CreateGameAsync();\n        var model = new TableInputDTO\n        {\n            TableNumber = 42,\n            IsAvailable = true,\n            MinBet = 15,\n            MaxBet dto.TableNumber.Should().Be(42);\n        dto.Casino!.Id.Should().Be(casino.Id);\n        dto.Game!.Id.Should().Be(game.Id);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task Match the app's existing visual style (look at Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml and wwwroot/css/casino.css first — the app has an Evangelion/NERV-inspired theme from Lab 3).\n\nCreate/modify the following:\n\n## 1. Views/Account/Login.cshtml\n- `@model aspnet.Models.LoginViewModel` (properties: Email, Password, RememberMe — Display names already set in Croatian).\n- Form posts to action `Login` on controller `Account`, include `returnUrl` from `ViewData[\"ReturnUrl\"]` via `asp-route-returnUrl`.\n- Standard validation: `asp-validation-summary`, `asp-validation-for` spans, and `@section Scripts { <partial name=\"_ValidationScriptsPartial\" /> }`.\n- Below the local login form, add a \"Vanjska prijava\" section with a button \"Prijava putem Googlea\" inside a form that POSTs to action `ExternalLogin` on controller `Account` with hidden/`asp-route-provider=\"Google\"` and `asp-route-returnUrl`.\n- Link to Register page (\"Nemaš račun? Registriraj se\").\n\n## 2. Views/Account/Register.cshtml\n- `@model aspnet.Models.RegisterViewModel` (Email, OIB, JMBG, Password, ConfirmPassword).\n- Form posts to action `Register` on controller `Account` with returnUrl. Full validation markup + validation scripts partial.\n\n## 3. Views/Account/ExternalLogin.cshtml\n- `@model aspnet.Models.ExternalLoginViewModel` (Email, OIB, JMBG, ProviderDisplayName, ReturnUrl).\n- Shown after first Google sign-in to complete registration. Heading like \"Dovrši registraciju (@Model.ProviderDisplayName)\".\n- Form posts to action `ExternalLoginConfirmation` on controller `Account`. Include hidden inputs for `ReturnUrl` and `ProviderDisplayName`. Editable Email, OIB, JMBG fields with validation.\n\n## 4. Views/Account/AccessDenied.cshtml\n- Simple \"Pristup odbijen\" page (403), themed, link back to home.\n\n## 5. Views/Shared/_LoginPartial.cshtml + _Layout.cshtml\n- _LoginPartial: inject `SignInManager<aspnet.Models.AppUser>` and `UserManager<aspnet.Models.AppUser>` (`@using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity`). If signed in: show \"Pozdrav, @User.Identity.Name\" and a Logout button — Logout MUST be a POST form to action `Logout` on controller `Account` (it has ValidateAntiForgeryToken; form tag helpers add the token automatically). If not signed in: links to Login (\"Prijava\") and Register (\"Registracija\").\n- Include `<partial name=\"_LoginPartial\" />` in the _Layout navbar, styled to fit.\n\n## 6. Dropzone upload on Views/Casino/Edit.cshtml + Views/Casino/_AttachmentList.cshtml\nRead the existing Views/Casino/Edit.cshtml first and keep its current edit form intact; add a \"Dokumenti\" section next to/below it.\n- Use Dropzone 5 from CDN: `https://unpkg.com/dropzone@5/dist/min/dropzone.min.css` and `.../dropzone.min.js`.\n- The upload form: `<form id=\"attachmentDz\" class=\"dropzone\" method=\"post\" enctype=\"multipart/form-data\" action=\"@Url.Action(\"UploadAttachment\", \"Casino\", new { casinoId = Model.Id })\"></form>`. The server action expects the file parameter named `file`, so set `Dropzone.options.attachmentDz = { paramName: \"file\", success: ... reload list ... }`.\n- Attachment list div `#attachmentList`, loaded via AJAX (jQuery `.load()`) from `@Url.Action(\"GetAttachments\", \"Casino\", new { casinoId = Model.Id })` on page load and after each successful upload.\n- Views/Casino/_AttachmentList.cshtml: `@model List<aspnet.Models.Attachment>` — table with FileName (link to `@a.FilePath` target=_blank), human-readable FileSize, CreatedAt, and a delete button per row calling JS `deleteAttachment(id)`.\n- `deleteAttachment(id)` does `$.ajax` POST to `@Url.Action(\"DeleteAttachment\", \"Casino\")` + `/...` — careful: the delete route is `kasina/privitci/{id}/obrisi`, so build the URL like `'@Url.Content(\"~/kasina/privitci/\")' + id + '/obrisi'`, then reload the list. (No antiforgery token needed; the actions don't validate it.)\n- Note: Edit.cshtml may already have a `@section Scripts` — merge into it, don't duplicate the section.\n- Check whether jQuery is loaded in _Layout; if not, use fetch() instead of jQuery.\n\nController route facts (already implemented in CasinoController):\n- POST upload: `kasina/{casinoId:int}/privitci` → action `UploadAttachment`\n- GET list (returns _AttachmentList partial): `kasina/{casinoId:int}/privitci` → action `GetAttachments`\n- POST delete: `kasina/privitci/{id:int}/obrisi` → action `DeleteAttachment`\n- These require role Admin or Manager (the Edit page itself is already role-gated, so no extra checks needed in the view).\n\nAttachment model fields: Id, CasinoId, FileName, FilePath, ContentType, FileSize (long, bytes), CreatedAt (DateTime).\n\nAfter making changes run `dotnet build` in /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet and fix any Razor compile errors. Report the files you created/changed.","subagent_type":"ux-designer"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_013GeTTAs15vWQB4VBuWKEoG"}

}, 1200);\n                loadAttachments();\n            },\n            error: function (file, message) {\n                var text = (message && message.message) ? message.message : message;\n                $(file.previewElement).addClass('dz-error').find('.dz-error-message span').text(text);\n            }\n        };\n\n        $(loadAttachments);\n    </script>\n}","replace_all":false},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01N7TEXdKTqbsa7b5MLZgvGm"}

HH:mm\")</td>\n                <td class=\"attachment-actions\">\n                    <button type=\"button\" class=\"btn-attachment-delete\" onclick=\"deleteAttachment(@a.Id)\">Obriši</button>\n                </td>\n            </tr>\n        }\n        </tbody>\n    </table>\n}\n\n@functions {\n    private static string FormatSize(long bytes)\n    {\n        if (bytes >= 1024L * 1024 * 1024) return $\"{bytes / (1024.0 * 1024 * 1024):0.#} GB\";\n        if (bytes >= 1024L * 1024) return $\"{bytes / (1024.0 * 1024):0.#} MB\";\n        if (bytes >= 1024L) return $\"{bytes / 1024.0:0.#} KB\";\n        return $\"{bytes} B\";\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Lb8GHnodFX3tAnJe9iiLr8"}

Your scope: Razor views, _Layout.cshtml, wwwroot/css, wwwroot/js. Do NOT touch controllers, models, repositories, Program.cs, or anything in aspnet.Tests.\n\n## The brief\n\nRestyle the ENTIRE site in the style of \"Performative UI\" (https://vorpus.github.io/performativeUI/ — a satirical React library tagged \"AI-native React components that signal how oversubscribed your funding round is\"). The user wants the site to be maximally performative for AI investors — full VC-hype-deck satire. Replace the current Evangelion/NERV theme. It's a React library and this is Razor, so recreate the aesthetic in pure CSS + vanilla JS (you may keep jQuery usage where it already exists).\n\nIts component catalog, which you should replicate as CSS classes/JS modules: Aurora (animated gradient mesh background), GradientText, GlassCard (glassmorphism), FloatingSparkles, Sparkle, EyebrowPill (uppercase pill label above headings), StatCounter (animated count-up numbers), TokenStream (LLM-style token-by-token streaming text), WordRoll/Rotator (rotating hype words), StickyBanner, StatusDot (pulsing \"all systems operational\" dot), LogoMarquee (infinite scrolling \"backed by\" logo strip), ChatBubble/ChatFAB (floating fake AI assistant button), PricingCard, WaitlistForm, MockIDE, AsciiHero, NodeGraphBackground, BeforeAfter, CommunityBadge.\n\n## Design language\n\n- Dark mode base (deep navy/black) with aurora gradient meshes (indigo→violet→cyan→pink), glassmorphism cards (blur, 1px white/10 borders, soft glow shadows), gradient text on every heading, rounded-full pills, shimmer/glow hover states on buttons.\n- ✨ emojis and sparkles everywhere. Pulsing status dots. Subtle floating particle animation.\n- Copy tone = unhinged VC bait. Examples to use/riff on: \"✨ AI-Native Casino Infrastructure\", \"Agentic gaming at frontier scale\", \"Powered by frontier models\", \"AGI-ready since 2026\", \"Backed by operators who get it\", \"Our Series C was oversubscribed 14x\", \"10x'ing GGR with LLMs\", \"SOC-2 compliant vibes\", \"Join 12,000+ on the waitlist\". Keep hype copy in English (investor-speak); keep all FUNCTIONAL labels, buttons and validation messages in Croatian as they are now.\n- `prefers-reduced-motion` media query to disable animations.\n\n## Page-by-page\n\n1. **_Layout.cshtml + casino.css (rewrite the theme)** — Aurora background site-wide, glass sticky navbar with gradient logo text + EyebrowPill (\"SERIES C 🚀\"), StatusDot in navbar (\"All systems agentic\"), keep _LoginPartial working (restyle it), glass footer with \"Powered by frontier models ✨\" + fake compliance badges. Site-wide FloatingSparkles canvas/JS (lightweight, throttled). StickyBanner at top: \"🎉 Our $420M Series C was oversubscribed — Join the waitlist\". ChatFAB bottom-right: floating ✨ button that opens a small glass ChatBubble panel with a fake TokenStream message like \"I'm an AI concierge trained on 10B hands of blackjack. How can I 10x you today?\" (canned responses only, no backend).\n\n2. **Home/Index.cshtml** — full performative landing page: EyebrowPill, huge GradientText hero (\"The AI-Native Casino Operating System\" or similar), WordRoll rotating words (agentic / frontier / multimodal / oversubscribed), TokenStream subheading typing itself out, two glow CTA buttons (\"Join the waitlist ✨\" → scrolls to a WaitlistForm that fake-succeeds, \"Razgledaj kasina\" → /kasina), StatCounter row of fake metrics ($2.3B GGR processed · 99.99% uptime · 14x oversubscribed · ∞ TAM), LogoMarquee of fake investor names (e.g. \"Hyperbolic Capital\", \"a16z-adjacent\", \"Vibe Ventures\", \"FOMO Fund\"), GlassCard grid showcasing the real entity pages (kasina, igre, stolovi, igrači, rezervacije, transakcije — keep the existing links working), maybe a MockIDE/terminal card showing a fake `casino.agent.deploy()` snippet. Keep whatever existing model data the view uses (it receives the casino list — show the real casinos inside GlassCards as \"Live deployments\" with StatusDots).\n\n3. **All entity views (Casino, Game, Table, Player, Employee, Transaction, Reservation: Index/Details/Create/Edit)** — restyle to GlassCards/glass tables with the new palette: keep ALL forms, tag helpers, validation spans, search/autocomplete JS, and the Dropzone attachment section on Casino/Edit fully functional (don't rename ids like attachmentDz/attachmentList or change form actions). Index tables = glass panels with gradient header text and EyebrowPills for counts (\"✨ 3 live deployments\"). Details pages get a StatCounter-style stat row where numbers exist (balance, bets). Delete buttons can say \"Sunset this deployment\".\n\n4. **Account views (Login, Register, ExternalLogin, AccessDenied)** — glass auth cards, gradient headings, EyebrowPill (\"FOUNDERS LOG IN HERE\"), Google button restyled with glow. AccessDenied: \"403 — This page is gated like our cap table.\" Keep all form posts/validation intact.\n\n5. **Error.cshtml** if present — \"Something hallucinated.\"\n\n## Hard constraints\n\n- Do not change any form action, controller/action names, input names, asp-for bindings, hidden fields, or element IDs used by existing JS (autocomplete, datepicker, dropzone, attachment list, validation).\n- Keep _ValidationScriptsPartial includes.\n- wwwroot/kocka (blackjack) can be left as-is.\n- Performance: sparkles/aurora must be CSS-animation or one lightweight canvas, no heavy libraries; no external JS dependencies beyond what's already there + Dropzone CDN already used.\n- After finishing, run `dotnet build` in /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet and fix all Razor errors.\n\nReport files changed and a summary of the visual system.","subagent_type":"ux-designer"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_012o1RVja28oQaEnsPsK8MPb"}

flex-wrap: wrap;\n}\n\n.login-user {\n  color: var(--muted);\n  font-size: 0.8rem;\n  letter-spacing: 0.02em;\n}\n.login-user strong {\n  font-weight: 700;\n  background: var(--grad);\n 0.35rem 0.8rem;\n  font-size: 0.72rem;\n  border-color: rgba(251, 113, 133, 0.45);\n  color: var(--danger);\n  background: rgba(251, 113, 133, 0.06);\n}\n.btn-logout:hover {\n  color: #fda4af;\n  border-color: rgba(251, 113, 133, 0.75);\n  box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(251, 113, 133, 0.25);\n}\n\n.auth-link-accent {\n  color: var(--violet-hi) !important;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(192, 132, 252, 0.22);\n}\n\n.dropzone#attachmentDz .dz-message {\n  color: var(--muted);\n  font-size: 0.9rem;\n  letter-spacing: 0.04em;\n  margin: 1.5em 0;\n}\n\n.dropzone#attachmentDz .dz-preview .dz-image {\n  border-radius: 12px;\n  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #1e1b4b, #312e81);\n}\n\n.dropzone#attachmentDz .dz-preview .dz-details {\n  color: var(--text);\n  font-size: 0.8rem;\n}\n\n.attachment-empty {\n  color: var(--muted);\n  font-size: 0.88rem;\n  font-style: italic;\n  margin: 0.25rem 0;\n}\n\n.attachment-link {\n  color: var(--indigo-hi);\n  text-decoration: none;\n  font-weight: 600;\n}\n.attachment-link:hover { color: var(--cyan); }\n\n.attachment-actions { text-align: right; }\n\n.btn-attachment-delete {\n  border: 1px solid rgba(251, 113, 133, 0.45);\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  padding: 0.28rem 0.75rem;\n  background: rgba(251, 113, 133, 0.08);\n  color: var(--danger);\n  font-size: 0.72rem;\n  font-weight: 700;\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) both;\n}\n.deal-in-ready .entity-card-wrap:nth-child(2),\n.deal-in-ready .floor-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 60ms; }\n.deal-in-ready .entity-card-wrap:nth-child(3),\n.deal-in-ready .floor-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 120ms; }\n.deal-in-ready .entity-card-wrap:nth-child(4),\n.deal-in-ready .floor-card:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 180ms; }\n.deal-in-ready .entity-card-wrap:nth-child(n+5),\n.deal-in-ready .floor-card:nth-child(n+5) { animation-delay: 240ms; }\n\n@keyframes card-rise {\n  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(22px); }\n  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }\n}\n\n/* ── Reduced motion: disable the theatre ────────────────────── */\n@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {\n  *, *::before, *::after {\n    animation-duration: 0.001s !important;\n    animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;\n    transition-duration: 0.001s !important;\n  }\n  .aurora-blob { animation: none {"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"a9b75e404d9bbb09d","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"head -215 /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/wwwroot/js/site.js > /tmp/casinopicker.js && wc -l /tmp/casinopicker.js","description":"Extract CasinoPicker class to temp file"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GSomeD8UjrqtQuHbzcPadp"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"a9b75e404d9bbb09d","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"cat > /tmp/performative.js << 'PERFEOF'\n\n/* ============================================================\n   ✨ PerformativeUI — AI-native interaction layer\n   Aurora is pure CSS; this module handles sparkles, counters,\n   token streams, word rolls, the AI concierge FAB, and the\n   waitlist form. Everything is canned. Nothing calls a model.\n   All motion respects prefers-reduced-motion.\n   ============================================================ */\nconst PerformativeUI = (() => {\n\n    function motionOk() {\n        return !window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;\n    }\n\n    /* ── FloatingSparkles — one lightweight canvas, ~24 ✦ ───── */\n    function sparkles() {\n        if (!motionOk()) return;\n        var canvas = document.getElementById('sparkle-canvas');\n        if (!canvas) return;\n\n        var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n        var dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2);\n        var W, H;\n\n        function resize() {\n            W = window.innerWidth; H = window.innerHeight;\n            canvas.width = W * dpr; canvas.height = H * dpr;\n            canvas.style.width = W + 'px'; canvas.style.height = H + 'px';\n            ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0);\n        }\n        resize();\n        window.addEventListener('resize', resize);\n\n        var COLORS = ['#c084fc', '#818cf8', '#22d3ee', '#f0abfc'];\n        var COUNT = 24;\n        var parts = [];\n        for (var i = 0; i < COUNT; i++) {\n            parts.push({\n                x: Math.random() * window.innerWidth,\n                y: Math.random() * window.innerHeight,\n                s: 1 + Math.random() * 2.2,           // size\n                vy: 0.1 + Math.random() * 0.25,        // drift up\n                vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.15,\n                tw: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,       // twinkle phase\n                c: COLORS[(Math.random() * COLORS.length) | 0]\n            });\n        }\n\n        var last = 0;\n        var FRAME = 1000 / 30; // throttle to ~30fps\n        var hidden = false;\n        document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function () { hidden = document.hidden; });\n\n        function draw(ts) {\n            requestAnimationFrame(draw);\n            if (hidden) return;\n            if (ts - last < FRAME) return;\n            last = ts;\n\n            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);\n            for (var i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) {\n                var p = parts[i];\n                p.y -= p.vy; p.x += p.vx; p.tw += 0.05;\n                if (p.y < -10) { p.y = H + 10; p.x = Math.random() * W; }\n                if (p.x < -10) p.x = W + 10;\n                if (p.x > W + 10) p.x = -10;\n\n                var a = 0.25 + Math.abs(Math.sin(p.tw)) * 0.55;\n                ctx.globalAlpha = a;\n                ctx.fillStyle = p.c;\n                // 4-point star\n                ctx.beginPath();\n                ctx.moveTo(p.x, p.y - p.s * 2);\n                ctx.quadraticCurveTo(p.x, p.y, p.x + p.s * 2, p.y);\n                ctx.quadraticCurveTo(p.x, p.y, p.x, p.y + p.s * 2);\n                ctx.quadraticCurveTo(p.x, p.y, p.x - p.s * 2, p.y);\n                ctx.quadraticCurveTo(p.x, p.y, p.x, p.y - p.s * 2);\n                ctx.fill();\n            }\n            ctx.globalAlpha = 1;\n        }\n        requestAnimationFrame(draw);\n    }\n\n    /* ── StatCounter — count up [data-count-to] when visible ── */\n    function statCounters() {\n        var els = document.querySelectorAll('[data-count-to]');\n        if (!els.length) return;\n\n        function run(el) {\n            var target = parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-count-to')) || 0;\n            var prefix = el.getAttribute('data-count-prefix') || '';\n            var suffix = el.getAttribute('data-count-suffix') || '';\n            var decimals = parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-count-decimals') || '0', 10);\n\n            if (!motionOk()) {\n                el.textContent = prefix + target.toFixed(decimals) + suffix;\n                return;\n            }\n            var dur = 1400, start = null;\n            function step(ts) {\n                if (!start) start = ts;\n                var t = Math.min((ts - start) / dur, 1);\n                var eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3);\n                el.textContent = prefix + (target * eased).toFixed(decimals) + suffix;\n                if (t < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);\n            }\n            requestAnimationFrame(step);\n        }\n\n        if (!('IntersectionObserver' in window)) {\n            els.forEach(run);\n            return;\n        }\n        var io = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {\n            entries.forEach(function (e) {\n                if (!e.isIntersecting) return;\n                run(e.target);\n                io.unobserve(e.target);\n            });\n        }, { threshold: 0.4 });\n        els.forEach(function (el) { io.observe(el); });\n    }\n\n    /* ── TokenStream — LLM-style token-by-token typing ──────── */\n    function streamTokens(el, text, opts) {\n        opts = opts || {};\n        return new Promise(function (resolve) {\n            if (!motionOk()) { el.textContent = text; resolve(); return; }\n\n            el.textContent = '';\n            var caret = document.createElement('span');\n            caret.className = 'token-caret';\n            el.after(caret);\n\n            // split into pseudo-tokens (word fragments) like a real stream\n            var tokens = text.match(/\\S+\\s*/g) || [text];\n            var i = 0;\n            function next() {\n                if (i >= tokens.length) {\n                    if (!opts.keepCaret) caret.remove();\n                    resolve();\n                    return;\n                }\n                el.textContent += tokens[i++];\n                setTimeout(next, 30 + Math.random() * 90); // variable latency = authenticity\n            }\n            setTimeout(next, opts.delay || 300);\n        });\n    }\n\n    function tokenStreams() {\n        document.querySelectorAll('[data-token-stream]').forEach(function (el) {\n            streamTokens(el, el.getAttribute('data-token-stream'), { delay: 500 });\n        });\n    }\n\n    /* ── WordRoll — rotating hype words ─────────────────────── */\n    function wordRolls() {\n        document.querySelectorAll('.word-roll').forEach(function (el) {\n            var words;\n            try { words = JSON.parse(el.getAttribute('data-words') || '[]'); }\n            catch (e) { words = []; }\n            if (!words.length) return;\n            var i = 0;\n            el.textContent = words[0];\n            if (!motionOk()) return;\n            setInterval(function () {\n                i = (i + 1) % words.length;\n                el.textContent = words[i];\n                el.style.animation = 'none';\n                void el.offsetWidth;            // restart CSS animation\n                el.style.animation = '';\n            }, 2200);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /* ── WaitlistForm — fake success, obviously ─────────────── */\n    function waitlist() {\n        var form = document.getElementById('waitlistForm');\n        if (!form) return;\n        form.addEventListener('submit', function (e) {\n            e.preventDefault();\n            var ok = document.getElementById('waitlistSuccess');\n            if (ok) {\n                var n = (12000 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 400)).toLocaleString();\n                ok.textContent = '✨ You are #' + n + ' on the waitlist. Your TAM has been notified.';\n                ok.style.display = 'block';\n            }\n            form.querySelector('button[type=\"submit\"]').disabled = true;\n        });\n    }\n\n    /* ── ChatFAB — AI concierge with canned token streams ───── */\n    function chatFab() {\n        var fab = document.getElementById('chatFab');\n        var panel = document.getElementById('chatPanel');\n        if (!fab || !panel) return;\n\n        var body = panel.querySelector('.chat-body');\n        var input = document.getElementById('chatInput');\n        var send = document.getElementById('chatSend');\n        var greeted = false;\n\n        var REPLIES = [\n            \"Great question. I've routed it to a swarm of 47 specialized sub-agents. Consensus: bullish.\",\n            \"Based on my training on 10B hands of blackjack, the optimal move is to raise another round.\",\n            \"I can't share that — it's gated behind our Series D data room. But the vibes are immaculate.\",\n            \"Let me 10x that for you. Done. It is now 10x. (This claim is SOC-2 compliant in spirit.)\",\n            \"Our agents have been agentic about this since 2026. Frontier-scale, fully multimodal, zero hallucinations*.\",\n            \"I've added that to the roadmap, the deck, and the TAM slide. All three are now bigger.\"\n        ];\n        var replyIdx = 0;\n\n        function aiMessage(text) {\n            var msg = document.createElement('div');\n            msg.className = 'chat-msg';\n            var span = document.createElement('span');\n            span.className = 'token-stream';\n            msg.appendChild(span);\n            body.appendChild(msg);\n            body.scrollTop = body.scrollHeight;\n            streamTokens(span, text, { delay: 250 }).then(function () {\n                body.scrollTop = body.scrollHeight;\n            });\n        }\n\n        fab.addEventListener('click', function () {\n            panel.classList.toggle('open');\n            if (panel.classList.contains('open') && !greeted) {\n                greeted = true;\n                aiMessage(\"Hi! I'm an AI concierge trained on 10B hands of blackjack. How can I 10x you today? ✨\");\n            }\n        });\n\n        function userSend() {\n            var text = (input.value || '').trim();\n            if (!text) return;\n            var msg = document.createElement('div');\n            msg.className = 'chat-msg chat-msg-user';\n            msg.textContent = text;\n            body.appendChild(msg);\n            input.value = '';\n            body.scrollTop = body.scrollHeight;\n            setTimeout(function () {\n                aiMessage(REPLIES[replyIdx++ % REPLIES.length]);\n            }, 450);\n        }\n\n        if (send) send.addEventListener('click', userSend);\n        if (input) input.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {\n            if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); userSend(); }\n        });\n    }\n\n    /* ── Card entrance — staggered rise on grids ────────────── */\n    function cardEntrance() {\n        if (!motionOk()) return;\n        document.querySelectorAll('.entity-grid, .floor-grid').forEach(function (grid) {\n            grid.classList.add('deal-in-ready');\n        });\n    }\n\n    return {\n        streamTokens: streamTokens,\n        init: function () {\n            sparkles();\n            statCounters();\n            tokenStreams();\n            wordRolls();\n            waitlist();\n            chatFab();\n            cardEntrance();\n        }\n    };\n})();\n\n$(function () { PerformativeUI.init(); });\nPERFEOF\ncat /tmp/casinopicker.js /tmp/performative.js > /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/wwwroot/js/site.js\nwc -l /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/wwwroot/js/site.js","description":"Rebuild site.js with CasinoPicker plus PerformativeUI module"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_011WzjXDfXRDTvBJGT2eTL25"}

{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"a9b75e404d9bbb09d","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"cd /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views\npython3 << 'EOF'\nimport re, io\n\nedits = {\n 'Casino/Index.cshtml':      ('Casinos</h1>'.replace('</h1>',''), '✨ @Model.Count live deployments'),\n}\n\ndef insert_pill(path, anchor, pill_text):\n    with open(path) as f: s = f.read()\n    new = s.replace(anchor, anchor + '\\n    <span class=\"eyebrow-pill eyebrow-pill-cyan\">' + pill_text + '</span>', 1)\n    assert new != s, path\n    with open(path, 'w') as f: f.write(new)\n\n# anchor = the action-bar h1 line end for each index page\npills = [\n ('Casino/Index.cshtml',      '<h1 class=\"page-title\" style=\"margin:0\">Casinos</h1>',      '✨ @Model.Count live deployments'),\n ('Game/Index.cshtml',        '<h1 class=\"page-title\" style=\"margin:0\">Games</h1>',        '✨ @Model.Count frontier game primitives'),\n ('Table/Index.cshtml',       '<h1 class=\"page-title\" style=\"margin:0\">Tables</h1>',       '✨ @Model.Count edge nodes'),\n ('Player/Index.cshtml',      '<h1 class=\"page-title\" style=\"margin:0\">Players</h1>',      '✨ @Model.Count entities in the player graph'),\n ('Employee/Index.cshtml',    '<h1 class=\"page-title\" style=\"margin:0\">Employees</h1>',    '✨ @Model.Count humans in the loop'),\n ('Reservation/Index.cshtml', '<h1 class=\"page-title\" style=\"margin:0\">Reservations</h1>', '✨ @Model.Count scheduled intents'),\n ('Transaction/Index.cshtml', '<h1 class=\"page-title\" style=\"margin:0\">Sve transakcije</h1>', '✨ @Model.Count ledger events'),\n]\nfor path, anchor, text in pills:\n    insert_pill(path, anchor, text)\nprint(\"done\")\nEOF","description":"Insert eyebrow count pills into all entity index pages"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Pm2PfAAWbPjPXvGZopbgRX"}
{"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","agent_id":"a9b75e404d9bbb09d","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"cd /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Views\npython3 << 'EOF'\ndef patch(path, anchor, addition):\n    with open(path) as f: s = f.read()\n    new = s.replace(anchor, anchor + addition, 1)\n    assert new != s, path\n    with open(path, 'w') as f: f.write(new)\n\ndef pill(label, value):\n    return f'\\n    <div class=\"stat-pill\"><span class=\"stat-label\">{label}</span><span class=\"stat-value\">{value}</span></div>'\n\n# Player details — balance / reservations / transactions\npatch('Player/Details.cshtml',\n      '<h1 class=\"page-title\">@Model.FirstName @Model.LastName</h1>',\n      '\\n\\n<div class=\"stat-bar\" style=\"margin-top:1rem;\">'\n      + pill('Saldo', '@Model.Balance.ToString(\"C0\")')\n      + pill('Rezervacije', '@Model.Reservations.Count')\n      + pill('Transakcije', '@Model.Transactions.Count')\n      + '\\n</div>')\n\n# Casino details — tables / available / employees\npatch('Casino/Details.cshtml',\n pill('Rezervacije', '@Model.Reservations.Count')\n      + '\\n</div>')\n\n# Fix stale lime inline color on Player details balance\nwith open('Player/Details.cshtml') as f: s = f.read()\ns = s.replace('style=\"color: var(--color-lime, #84cc16)\"', 'style=\"color: var(--success)\"')\nwith open('Player/Details.cshtml', 'w') as f: f.write(s)\n\nprint(\"done\")\nEOF","description":"Add {"session_id":"b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/b3c2d32e-f404-47aa-9960-d819d0a76590.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"auto","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Agent","tool_input":{"description":"Fix overflowing action buttons","prompt":"Visual bug fix in the casino ASP.NET MVC app at /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet. Scope: only Razor views under Views/ and wwwroot/css/casino.css. Do not touch controllers, models, or JS behavior.\n\nContext: the site was just restyled with a \"Performative UI\" glassmorphism theme (dark navy, glass cards `backdrop-filter: blur`, gradient text, pill buttons) — all in wwwroot/css/casino.css, rewritten in the previous session.\n\nBug report from the user: the homepage is perfect, but on the OTHER pages the \"Uredi\" (edit) and \"Obriši\" (delete) action buttons render OUTSIDE the box/panel that contains the rest of the content. This affects entity pages — likely the Index list/table views and/or Details views for Casino (kasina), Game (igre), Table (stolovi), Player (igraci), Employee (djelatnici), Reservation (rezervacije), Transaction (transakcije).\n\nInvestigate properly:\n1. Read a couple of the affected views (e.g. Views/Casino/Index.cshtml, Views/Game/Index.cshtml, Views/Casino/Details.cshtml) to see how the action buttons/forms are marked up (the delete button sits inside a POST form; edit is a link styled as a button).\n2. Read the relevant rules in wwwroot/css/casino.css (.data-table, .entity-card, action button classes, glass panel containers). Likely culprits: the glass panel/table wrapper getting `overflow` + fixed width/padding mismatch, pill buttons with white-space/nowrap pushing past the container, an absolutely-positioned element whose positioning context changed when the old theme's wrapper was replaced, inline-form display issues, or the panel not wrapping the action column (e.g. buttons after the closing tag of the card / table inside a container with smaller width).\n3. Reproduce if helpful: run `cd /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet && dotnet run --urls http://localhost:5210` and curl the pages to inspect the rendered HTML structure (e.g. `curl -s localhost:5210/kasina`), checking whether the buttons are inside the panel element in the DOM or just visually overflowing via CSS. Kill the server when done.\n\nFix it across ALL affected entity views consistently (keep the performative styling — buttons should sit inside the glass panel, aligned in the actions column/row, responsive without horizontal overflow). Do not rename element IDs, form actions, or anti-forgery forms.\n\nThen run `dotnet build` and confirm 0 errors. Report root cause and files changed.","subagent_type":"ux-designer"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XoBnT3PGTx13NP2sWT415d"}

Do NOT touch controllers, models, repositories, or Program.cs — the controller work is already done.\n\nContext: Casino documents (attachments) are currently only visible on the Edit page (`aspnet/Views/Casino/Edit.cshtml`), which loads the partial `aspnet/Views/Casino/_AttachmentList.cshtml` via AJAX into `#attachmentList`. The Details page (`aspnet/Views/Casino/Details.cshtml`) has no documents section at all, and the attachment list has no explicit download button (only a link that opens the static file inline).\n\nThe controller (CasinoController, route prefix `kasina`) now provides:\n- `GET /kasina/{casinoId}/privitci` — returns the `_AttachmentList` partial; authorized for ANY logged-in user (`[Authorize]`). Url.Action name: `GetAttachments`, controller `Casino`, route value `casinoId`.\n- `GET /kasina/privitci/{id}/preuzmi` — NEW download endpoint, serves the file with Content-Disposition: attachment and the original filename; any logged-in user. Url.Action name: `DownloadAttachment`, controller `Casino`, route value `id`.\n- `POST /kasina/privitci/{id}/obrisi` — delete, Admin/Manager only (unchanged).\n- Casino Details page itself requires login (`[Authorize]`), so everyone viewing it may list/download documents, but only Admin/Manager may delete.\n\nTasks:\n\n1. **`aspnet/Views/Casino/_AttachmentList.cshtml`**:\n   - Add a \"Preuzmi\" (download) action per row linking to the download endpoint (`/kasina/privitci/{id}/preuzmi` — prefer `Url.Action(\"DownloadAttachment\", \"Casino\", new { id = a.Id })` or asp-tag helpers, matching existing style). {"session_id":"26bf0915-456a-4611-b67f-5374b0fc24c3","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/26bf0915-456a-4611-b67f-5374b0fc24c3.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet","permission_mode":"auto","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Services/MailService.cs","content":"using MailKit.Net.Smtp;\nusing MailKit.Security;\nusing MimeKit;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Services;\n\npublic class MailService\n{\n    private readonly IConfiguration _config;\n    private readonly ILogger<MailService> _logger;\n\n    public MailService(IConfiguration config, ILogger<MailService> logger)\n    {\n        _config = config;\n        _logger = logger;\n    }\n\n    public async Task SendWaitlistConfirmationAsync(string toEmail, int position)\n    {\n        var host = _config[\"Smtp:Host\"]!;\n        var port = int.Parse(_config[\"Smtp:Port\"]!);\n        var user = _config[\"Smtp:User\"]!;\n        var password = _config[\"Smtp:Password\"]!;\n        var from = _config[\"Smtp:From\"]!;\n\n        var message = new MimeMessage();\n        message.From.Add(new MailboxAddress(\"AI-Native Casino OS\", from));\n        message.To.Add(MailboxAddress.Parse(toEmail));\n        message.Subject = $\"✨ You're #{position:N0} on the waitlist — your TAM has been notified\";\n\n        var body = new BodyBuilder\n        {\n            TextBody =\n                $\"You're on the waitlist.\\n\\n\" +\n                $\"Position: #{position:N0}\\n\\n\" +\n                \"We onboard one operator per epoch. When a spot opens up at the table, \" +\n                \"an agent (possibly human) will reach out.\\n\\n\" +\n                \"Until then: stay liquid.\\n\\n\" +\n                \"— AI-Native Casino OS\\n\" +\n                \"Agentic gaming at frontier scale\",\n            HtmlBody = BuildHtmlBody(position)\n        };\n        message.Body = body.ToMessageBody();\n\n        using var client = new SmtpClient();\n        // Port 465 = implicitni TLS od prve sekunde (Gmail \"TLS always\")\n        await client.ConnectAsync(host, port, SecureSocketOptions.SslOnConnect);\n        await client.AuthenticateAsync(user, password);\n        await client.SendAsync(message);\n        await client.DisconnectAsync(true);\n\n        _logger.LogInformation(\"Waitlist confirmation sent to {Email} (position {Position})\", toEmail, position);\n    }\n\n    // Inline stilovi i table layout — email klijenti ne podržavaju moderni CSS\n    private static string BuildHtmlBody(int position) => $$\"\"\"\n        <!DOCTYPE html>\n        <html lang=\"en\">\n        <head>\n            <meta charset=\"utf-8\">\n            <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\">\n            <title>You're on the waitlist</title>\n        </head>\n        <body style=\"margin:0;padding:0;background-color:#0a0c14;font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif;\">\n            <div style=\"display:none;max-height:0;overflow:hidden;\">\n                You're #{{position:N0}} on the waitlist. We onboard one operator per epoch.\n            </div>\n            <table role=\"presentation\" width=\"100%\" cellpadding=\"0\" cellspacing=\"0\" style=\"background-color:#0a0c14;padding:32px Index renders the Casino Floor custom page showing live table availability.\nusing System.Diagnostics;\nusing aspnet.Models;\nusing aspnet.Repositories;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Controllers;\n\npublic class HomeController : Controller\n{\n    private readonly ICasinoRepository _casinos;\n\n    public HomeController(ICasinoRepository casinos) => _casinos = casinos;\n\n    // Casino Floor — custom page showing all casinos with live table availability\n    public IActionResult Index() => View(_casinos.GetAll());","new_string":"// Handles the root route. Index renders the Casino Floor custom page showing live table availability.\nusing System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;\nusing System.Diagnostics;\nusing aspnet.Data;\nusing aspnet.Models;\nusing aspnet.Repositories;\nusing aspnet.Services;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Controllers;\n\npublic class HomeController : Controller\n{\n    private readonly ICasinoRepository _casinos;\n\n    public HomeController(ICasinoRepository casinos) => _casinos = casinos;\n\n    // Casino Floor — custom page showing all casinos with live table availability\n    public IActionResult Index() => View(_casinos.GetAll());\n\n    // Waitlist prijava: sprema email i šalje jednokratni potvrdni mail.\n    // Pozicija je stvarni broj u tablici + 12000 da se poklapa s \"Join 12,000+\" na stranici.\n    [HttpPost]\n    public async Task<IActionResult> Waitlist(\n        string? email,\n        [FromServices] CasinoDbContext db,\n        [FromServices] MailService mail,\n        [FromServices] ILogger<HomeController> logger)\n    {\n        email = email?.Trim().ToLowerInvariant();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(email) || email.Length > 320 || !new EmailAddressAttribute().IsValid(email))\n        {\n            return BadRequest(new { error = \"Please enter a valid email address.\" });\n        }\n\n        var existing = await db.WaitlistEntries.FirstOrDefaultAsync(w => w.Email == email);\n        if (existing is not null)\n        {\n            var existingPosition = 12000 + await db.WaitlistEntries.CountAsync(w => w.Id <= existing.Id);\n            return Ok(new { position = existingPosition, alreadyJoined = true });\n        }\n\n        db.WaitlistEntries.Add(new WaitlistEntry { Email = email });\n        await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n        var position = 12000 + await db.WaitlistEntries.CountAsync();\n        try\n        {\n            await mail.SendWaitlistConfirmationAsync(email, position);\n        }\n        catch (Exception ex)\n        {\n            // Prijava je spremljena; mail je best-effort\n            logger.LogError(ex, \"Failed to send waitlist confirmation to {Email}\", email);\n        }\n\n        return Ok(new { position, alreadyJoined = false });\n    }","replace_all":false},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TqdKH6jEuYeSPEwpka4smE"}

You must only touch files in your domain: `aspnet/wwwroot/js/site.js` and `aspnet/Views/Home/Index.cshtml`.\n\nProject root: /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet\n\n## The new backend endpoint (already implemented and building — do not modify it)\n\n`POST /Home/Waitlist` with form-encoded body field `email`.\n\n- Success (200): JSON `{ \"position\": 12345, \"alreadyJoined\": false }` — `position` is already offset by 12,000 to match the \"Join 12,000+ on the waitlist\" copy on the page; `alreadyJoined: true` means this email was on the list before (no new mail is sent).\n- Validation failure (400): JSON `{ \"error\": \"Please enter a valid email address.\" }`\n- No antiforgery token is required.\n- On success a real, one-time confirmation email is sent to the address.\n\n## What to change\n\n1. **`aspnet/wwwroot/js/site.js`** — the `waitlist()` function around line 393-407 currently fakes success with a random number. Rewrite it to:\n   - `preventDefault`, read the email from the form's email input, do a basic non-empty check.\n   - Disable the submit button and show a brief loading state (e.g. button text \"Dealing you in…\") while the request is in flight.\n   - `fetch('/Home/Waitlist', { method: 'POST', body: new URLSearchParams({ email: ... }) })`.\n   - On 200: show the success element with the real position from the response, keeping the page's satirical tone. Use `position.toLocaleString()`. If `alreadyJoined` is true, use a distinct line acknowledging they were already on the list (still satirical). Mention the confirmation email landed in their inbox (e.g. check spam, performatively). Keep the button disabled after success.\n   - On 400 or network error: show the error message in/near the success element (or a suitable element), re-enable the button so they can retry. Don't leave the user stuck.\n\n2. **`aspnet/Views/Home/Index.cshtml`** — the waitlist section around lines 186-198. The copy currently says \"The form below does nothing, like most waitlists.\" That is no longer true: the form now saves the email and sends a real, fancy confirmation email. Update that line (and the top-of-file comment mentioning \"fake-success WaitlistForm\" if you like) so the copy stays in the page's satirical performative-startup voice but reflects that a real email actually gets sent. Your TAM has been notified.';\n                ok.style.display = 'block';\n            }\n            form.querySelector('button[type=\"submit\"]').disabled = true;\n        });\n    }","new_string":"    /* ── WaitlistForm — real backend, somehow ───────────────── */\n    // POSTs to /Home/Waitlist, which persists the email and sends an\n    // actual confirmation mail. The satire stays; the form does not.\n    function waitlist() {\n        var form = document.getElementById('waitlistForm');\n        if (!form) return;\n        var ok = document.getElementById('waitlistSuccess');\n        var btn = form.querySelector('button[type=\"submit\"]');\n        var input = form.querySelector('input[type=\"email\"]');\n\n        function show(msg, isError) {\n            if (!ok) return;\n            ok.textContent = msg;\n            ok.style.color = isError ? 'var(--danger)' : '';\n            ok.style.display = 'block';\n        }\n\n        form.addEventListener('submit', function (e) {\n            e.preventDefault();\n            var email = input ? input.value.trim() : '';\n            if (!email) {\n                show('⚠ We need an email. Even our agents can\\'t hallucinate your inbox.', true);\n                return;\n            }\n\n            var idleLabel = btn ? btn.textContent : '';\n            if (btn) {\n                btn.disabled = true;\n                btn.textContent = 'Dealing you in…';\n            }\n\n            fetch('/Home/Waitlist', {\n                method: 'POST',\n                body: new URLSearchParams({ email: email })\n            })\n                .then(function (res) {\n                    return res.json().then(function (data) {\n                        if (!res.ok) {\n                            throw new Error(data && data.error\n                                ? data.error\n                                : 'Something went wrong on the agentic mesh.');\n                        }\n                        return data;\n                    });\n                })\n                .then(function (data) {\n                    var n = Number(data.position).toLocaleString();\n                    if (data.alreadyJoined) {\n                        show('✨ Easy — you were already #' + n + ' on the waitlist. ' +\n                            'Joining twice does not move you up, but the conviction has been logged.');\n                    } else {\n                        show('✨ You are #' + n + ' on the waitlist. A confirmation email is in your ' +\n                            'inbox — check spam, our deliverability is still pre-revenue. Your TAM has been notified.');\n                    }\n                    if (btn) btn.textContent = 'Waitlisted ✓';\n                    // Button stays disabled — one operator per epoch, remember.\n                })\n                .catch(function (err) {\n                    show('⚠ ' + (err && err.message ? err.message : 'Network error. Even the moat has outages.'), true);\n                    if (btn) {\n                        btn.disabled = false;\n                        btn.textContent = idleLabel;\n                    }\n                });\n        });\n    }","replace_all":false},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XtGQsABpZeMUXhH86vBjTe"}
