{"session_id":"26bf0915-456a-4611-b67f-5374b0fc24c3","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/26bf0915-456a-4611-b67f-5374b0fc24c3.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"auto","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"ls /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Controllers/Api/; head -40 /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Controllers/Api/*.cs | head -60","description":"Check existing API controllers for conventions"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01EoEwUBXR8aELXq3UnuemV4"}
{"session_id":"26bf0915-456a-4611-b67f-5374b0fc24c3","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/26bf0915-456a-4611-b67f-5374b0fc24c3.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"auto","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Models/DTO/BlackjackDTO.cs","content":"namespace aspnet.Models.DTO;\n\n// Pogled na stol personaliziran za jednog klijenta: skrivena dealerova karta\n// se ne šalje, a Can* zastavice server računa da klijent ne mora znati pravila.\npublic record BlackjackCardDTO(string? Rank, string? Suit, string? Color, bool Hidden);\n\npublic record BlackjackSeatDTO(\n    bool Occupied,\n    bool IsYou,\n    int Balance,\n    int SelectedBet,\n    int CurrentBet,\n    List<BlackjackCardDTO> Hand,\n    int Total,\n    bool Stood,\n    bool Bust,\n    bool Blackjack,\n    int Wins,\n    int Losses,\n    int Pushes);\n\npublic record BlackjackStateDTO(\n    long Version,\n    string Phase,\n    string Status,\n    bool SoloMode,\n    bool RevealDealer,\n    int? TurnSeat,\n    int? YourSeat,\n    List<BlackjackCardDTO> DealerHand,\n    int? DealerTotal,\n    Dictionary<int, string?> LastRoundResults,\n    Dictionary<int, BlackjackSeatDTO> Players,\n    bool CanJoin1,\n    bool CanJoin2,\n    bool CanLeave,\n    bool CanToggleSolo,\n    bool CanReset,\n    bool CanSetBet,\n    bool CanDeal,\n    bool CanHit,\n    bool CanStand,\n    bool CanDouble);\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TcHnEUKSTY6hMqrSofW7dh"}
{"session_id":"26bf0915-456a-4611-b67f-5374b0fc24c3","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/26bf0915-456a-4611-b67f-5374b0fc24c3.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"auto","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Services/BlackjackTableService.cs","content":"using aspnet.Models.DTO;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Services;\n\n// Server-side blackjack stol: špil, dijeljenje, redoslijed poteza i isplate\n// žive ovdje — klijent (wwwroot/kocka) je samo GUI koji zove API i crta stanje.\n// Jedan zajednički stol s dva sjedala; klijent se identificira clientId-jem\n// kojeg tab čuva u sessionStorageu, pa reload zadržava sjedalo.\npublic class BlackjackTableService\n{\n    private const int StartingBalance = 1000;\n    private static readonly int[] AllowedBets = { 25, 50, 100, 200 };\n\n    // Sjedalo čiji vlasnik ne polla duže od ovoga smatra se napuštenim\n    private static readonly TimeSpan TurnTimeout = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(60);\n    private static readonly TimeSpan SeatTimeout = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(120);\n\n    private static readonly (string Suit, string Color)[] Suits =\n    {\n        (\"♥\", \"red\"), (\"♦\", \"red\"), (\"♣\", \"black\"), (\"♠\", \"black\")\n    };\n\n    private static readonly (string Rank, int Value)[] Ranks =\n    {\n        (\"A\", 11), (\"K\", 10), (\"Q\", 10), (\"J\", 10), (\"10\", 10),\n        (\"9\", 9), (\"8\", 8), (\"7\", 7), (\"6\", 6), (\"5\", 5), (\"4\", 4), (\"3\", 3), (\"2\", 2)\n    };\n\n    private sealed record Card(string Rank, string Suit, string Color, int Value);\n\n    private sealed class Seat\n    {\n        public string? ClientId;\n        public DateTime LastSeenUtc;\n        public int Balance = StartingBalance;\n        public int SelectedBet = 25;\n        public int CurrentBet;\n        public List<Card> Hand = new();\n        public bool Stood;\n        public bool Bust;\n        public bool Blackjack;\n        public int Wins;\n        public int Losses;\n        public int Pushes;\n    }\n\n    private readonly object _sync = new();\n    private readonly Random _rng = new();\n\n    private string _phase = \"waiting\";\n    private string _status = \"Join Seat 1 or Seat 2 to play.\";\n    private bool _soloMode;\n    private bool _revealDealer;\n    private int? _turnSeat;\n    private long _version;\n    private List<Card> _deck = new();\n    private List<Card> _dealerHand = new();\n    private readonly Dictionary<int, Seat> _seats = new() { [1] = new Seat(), [2] = new Seat() };\n    private readonly Dictionary<int, string?> _lastRoundResults = new() { [1] = null, [2] = null };\n\n    // ── Javne operacije (sve vraćaju personalizirani pogled na stol) ────────\n\n    public BlackjackStateDTO GetState(string clientId)\n        => Mutate(clientId, _ => { });\n\n    public BlackjackStateDTO Join(string clientId, int seatNumber) => Mutate(clientId, _ =>\n    {\n        if (InActiveHand()) return;\n\n        var target = _seats[seatNumber];\n        if (_soloMode)\n        {\n            var otherOccupied = ActiveSeats().Any(s => s != seatNumber);\n            if (otherOccupied)\n            {\n                _status = \"Solo mode allows only one occupied seat. Leave or reset first.\";\n                return;\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (target.ClientId != null && target.ClientId != clientId)\n        {\n            _status = $\"Seat {seatNumber} is already taken.\";\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Premještanje: oslobodi staro sjedalo\n        var current = FindSeat(clientId);\n        if (current is int old && old != seatNumber)\n        {\n            _seats[old].ClientId = null;\n        }\n\n        target.ClientId = clientId;\n        target.LastSeenUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;\n        _status = $\"Player {seatNumber} joined. Select your bet and press Deal when ready.\";\n    });\n\n    public BlackjackStateDTO Leave(string clientId) => Mutate(clientId, seat =>\n    {\n        if (seat is not int n) return;\n        if (InActiveHand())\n        {\n            _status = \"Cannot leave seat during an active hand.\";\n            return;\n        }\n        VacateSeat(n);\n        _status = \"Seat released.\";\n    });\n\n    public BlackjackStateDTO ToggleSolo(string clientId) => Mutate(clientId, _ =>\n    {\n        if (InActiveHand()) return;\n        if (!_soloMode && ActiveSeats().Count > 1)\n        {\n            _status = \"Leave one seat first, then enable Solo Mode.\";\n            return;\n        }\n        _soloMode = !_soloMode;\n        _status = _soloMode\n            ? \"Solo Mode enabled. One occupied seat can play.\"\n            : \"Solo Mode disabled. Two occupied seats are required.\";\n    });\n\n    public BlackjackStateDTO Reset(string clientId) => Mutate(clientId, _ =>\n    {\n        if (InActiveHand()) return;\n        _phase = \"waiting\";\n        _turnSeat = null;\n        _deck = new List<Card>();\n        _dealerHand = new List<Card>();\n        _revealDealer = false;\n        _lastRoundResults[1] = null;\n        _lastRoundResults[2] = null;\n        _seats[1] = new Seat();\n        _seats[2] = new Seat();\n        _status = \"Table reset. Join a seat to start.\";\n    });\n\n    public BlackjackStateDTO SetBet(string clientId, int amount) => Mutate(clientId, seat =>\n    {\n        if (seat is not int n || InActiveHand()) return;\n        if (!AllowedBets.Contains(amount))\n        {\n            _status = \"Invalid bet.\";\n            return;\n        }\n        var player = _seats[n];\n        if (amount > player.Balance)\n        {\n            _status = \"Bet too high for your current balance.\";\n            return;\n        }\n        player.SelectedBet = amount;\n        _status = $\"Player {n} selected ${amount}.\";\n    });\n\n    public BlackjackStateDTO Deal(string clientId) => Mutate(clientId, seat =>\n    {\n        if (seat is null || InActiveHand()) return;\n        if (!SeatsReadyToDeal())\n        {\n            _status = _soloMode\n                ? \"Solo mode needs one occupied seat with a valid bet and balance.\"\n                : \"Two occupied seats with valid bets and balances are required.\";\n            return;\n        }\n\n        _deck = MakeShuffledDeck();\n        _dealerHand = new List<Card> { DrawCard(), DrawCard() };\n        _revealDealer = false;\n        _phase = \"player-turns\";\n        _lastRoundResults[1] = null;\n        _lastRoundResults[2] = null;\n\n        foreach (var n in ActiveSeats())\n        {\n            var player = _seats[n];\n            player.Balance -= player.SelectedBet;\n            player.CurrentBet = player.SelectedBet;\n            player.Hand = new List<Card> { DrawCard(), DrawCard() };\n            player.Bust = false;\n            player.Stood = false;\n            player.Blackjack = IsBlackjack(player.Hand);\n            if (player.Blackjack) player.Stood = true;\n        }\n\n        var firstTurn = NextTurnSeat(null);\n        _turnSeat = firstTurn;\n        if (firstTurn is null)\n        {\n            RunDealer();\n            return;\n        }\n        _status = $\"Round started. Player {firstTurn}'s turn.\";\n    });\n\n    public BlackjackStateDTO Hit(string clientId) => Mutate(clientId, seat =>\n    {\n        if (!IsTurnOf(seat, out var n)) return;\n        var player = _seats[n];\n        player.Hand.Add(DrawCard());\n        if (ScoreHand(player.Hand) > 21)\n        {\n            player.Bust = true;\n            player.Stood = true;\n            _status = $\"Player {n} busts.\";\n            AdvanceTurn(n);\n            return;\n        }\n        _status = $\"Player {n} hits.\";\n    });\n\n    public BlackjackStateDTO Stand(string clientId) => Mutate(clientId, seat =>\n    {\n        if (!IsTurnOf(seat, out var n)) return;\n        _seats[n].Stood = true;\n        _status = $\"Player {n} stands.\";\n        AdvanceTurn(n);\n    });\n\n    public BlackjackStateDTO Double(string clientId) => Mutate(clientId, seat =>\n    {\n        if (!IsTurnOf(seat, out var n)) return;\n        var player = _seats[n];\n        if (player.Hand.Count != 2 || player.Balance < player.CurrentBet)\n        {\n            _status = \"Double Down unavailable.\";\n            return;\n        }\n        player.Balance -= player.CurrentBet;\n        player.CurrentBet *= 2;\n        player.Hand.Add(DrawCard());\n        player.Stood = true;\n        _status = ScoreHand(player.Hand) > 21\n            ? $\"Player {n} busts after Double Down.\"\n            : $\"Player {n} doubles to ${player.CurrentBet}.\";\n        if (ScoreHand(player.Hand) > 21) player.Bust = true;\n        AdvanceTurn(n);\n    });\n\n    // ── Tijek igre ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    private bool InActiveHand() => _phase is \"player-turns\" or \"dealer-turn\";\n\n    private bool IsTurnOf(int? seat, out int n)\n    {\n        n = seat ?? 0;\n        return seat is int s && _phase == \"player-turns\" && _turnSeat == s;\n    }\n\n    private List<int> ActiveSeats() => _seats.Where(kv => kv.Value.ClientId != null).Select(kv => kv.Key).ToList();\n\n    private bool SeatsReadyToDeal()\n    {\n        var seats = ActiveSeats();\n        var required = _soloMode ? 1 : 2;\n        if (seats.Count < required) return false;\n        return seats.All(n =>\n        {\n            var p = _seats[n];\n            return p.Balance >= p.SelectedBet && p.SelectedBet > 0;\n        });\n    }\n\n    private int? NextTurnSeat(int? currentSeat)\n    {\n        var order = new[] { 1, 2 };\n        var start = currentSeat is int c ? Array.IndexOf(order, c) + 1 : 0;\n        for (var offset = 0; offset < order.Length; offset++)\n        {\n            var n = order[(start + offset) % order.Length];\n            var p = _seats[n];\n            if (p.ClientId != null && p.Hand.Count > 0 && !p.Stood && !p.Bust && !p.Blackjack)\n            {\n                return n;\n            }\n        }\n        return null;\n    }\n\n    private void AdvanceTurn(int seatThatMoved)\n    {\n        var next = NextTurnSeat(seatThatMoved);\n        if (next is int n)\n        {\n            _turnSeat = n;\n            _phase = \"player-turns\";\n            _status = $\"Player {n}'s turn.\";\n            return;\n        }\n        RunDealer();\n    }\n\n    private void RunDealer()\n    {\n        _phase = \"dealer-turn\";\n        _revealDealer = true;\n        while (ScoreHand(_dealerHand) < 17)\n        {\n            _dealerHand.Add(DrawCard());\n        }\n        ResolveRound();\n    }\n\n    private void ResolveRound()\n    {\n        var dealerTotal = ScoreHand(_dealerHand);\n        var dealerBlackjack = IsBlackjack(_dealerHand);\n        var summaries = new List<string>();\n        _lastRoundResults[1] = null;\n        _lastRoundResults[2] = null;\n\n        foreach (var n in ActiveSeats())\n        {\n            var player = _seats[n];\n            if (player.CurrentBet <= 0) continue;\n\n            var playerTotal = ScoreHand(player.Hand);\n            string result;\n            var payout = 0;\n\n            if (player.Bust)\n            {\n                result = \"loss\";\n            }\n            else if (player.Blackjack && !dealerBlackjack)\n            {\n                result = \"win\";\n                payout = (int)Math.Floor(player.CurrentBet * 2.5);\n            }\n            else if (dealerTotal > 21 || playerTotal > dealerTotal)\n            {\n                result = \"win\";\n                payout = player.CurrentBet * 2;\n            }\n            else if (playerTotal == dealerTotal)\n            {\n                result = \"push\";\n                payout = player.CurrentBet;\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                result = \"loss\";\n            }\n\n            switch (result)\n            {\n                case \"win\":\n                    player.Wins++;\n                    player.Balance += payout;\n                    summaries.Add($\"P{n} wins\");\n                    break;\n                case \"push\":\n                    player.Pushes++;\n                    player.Balance += payout;\n                    summaries.Add($\"P{n} pushes\");\n                    break;\n                default:\n                    player.Losses++;\n                    summaries.Add($\"P{n} loses\");\n                    break;\n            }\n\n            _lastRoundResults[n] = result;\n            player.CurrentBet = 0;\n            player.Stood = true;\n        }\n\n        _phase = \"round-over\";\n        _turnSeat = null;\n        _revealDealer = true;\n        _status = $\"Round over: {string.Join(\", \", summaries)}. Press Deal for next hand.\";\n    }\n\n    // ── Špil i bodovanje ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    private List<Card> MakeShuffledDeck()\n    {\n        var deck = new List<Card>();\n        foreach (var (suit, color) in Suits)\n        {\n            foreach (var (rank, value) in Ranks)\n            {\n                deck.Add(new Card(rank, suit, color, value));\n            }\n        }\n        for (var i = deck.Count - 1; i > 0; i--)\n        {\n            var j = _rng.Next(i + 1);\n            (deck[i], deck[j]) = (deck[j], deck[i]);\n        }\n        return deck;\n    }\n\n    private Card DrawCard()\n    {\n        if (_deck.Count == 0)\n        {\n            _deck = MakeShuffledDeck();\n        }\n        var card = _deck[^1];\n        _deck.RemoveAt(_deck.Count - 1);\n        return card;\n    }\n\n    private static int ScoreHand(List<Card> hand)\n    {\n        var total = hand.Sum(c => c.Value);\n        var aces = hand.Count(c => c.Rank == \"A\");\n        while (total > 21 && aces > 0)\n        {\n            total -= 10;\n            aces--;\n        }\n        return total;\n    }\n\n    private static bool IsBlackjack(List<Card> hand) => hand.Count == 2 && ScoreHand(hand) == 21;\n\n    // ── Sjedala, timeouti, pogled ────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n    private int? FindSeat(string clientId) =>\n        _seats.Where(kv => kv.Value.ClientId == clientId).Select(kv => (int?)kv.Key).FirstOrDefault();\n\n    private void VacateSeat(int n)\n    {\n        var seat = _seats[n];\n        seat.ClientId = null;\n        seat.Hand = new List<Card>();\n        seat.CurrentBet = 0;\n    }\n\n    // Klijenti koji nestanu bez Leave (zatvoren tab, izgubljena mreža) ne smiju\n    // trajno blokirati stol: na potezu ih auto-stand, izvan ruke oslobodi sjedalo.\n    private void SweepInactive()\n    {\n        var now = DateTime.UtcNow;\n\n        if (_phase == \"player-turns\" && _turnSeat is int t)\n        {\n            var seat = _seats[t];\n            if (seat.ClientId != null && now - seat.LastSeenUtc > TurnTimeout)\n            {\n                seat.Stood = true;\n                _status = $\"Player {t} timed out and stands.\";\n                AdvanceTurn(t);\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (!InActiveHand())\n        {\n            foreach (var n in ActiveSeats())\n            {\n                if (now - _seats[n].LastSeenUtc > SeatTimeout)\n                {\n                    VacateSeat(n);\n                    _status = $\"Seat {n} released (inactive).\";\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private BlackjackStateDTO Mutate(string clientId, Action<int?> action)\n    {\n        lock (_sync)\n        {\n            var seat = FindSeat(clientId);\n            if (seat is int n)\n            {\n                _seats[n].LastSeenUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;\n            }\n            SweepInactive();\n            action(FindSeat(clientId));\n            _version++;\n            return BuildView(clientId);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private BlackjackStateDTO BuildView(string clientId)\n    {\n        var yourSeat = FindSeat(clientId);\n        var localPlayer = yourSeat is int ys ? _seats[ys] : null;\n        var inActiveHand = InActiveHand();\n        var someoneSeated = ActiveSeats().Count > 0;\n        var isMyTurn = localPlayer != null && _phase == \"player-turns\" && _turnSeat == yourSeat;\n\n        var dealerHand = _dealerHand\n            .Select((card, index) => !_revealDealer && index == 1\n                ? new BlackjackCardDTO(null, null, null, true)\n                : new BlackjackCardDTO(card.Rank, card.Suit, card.Color, false))\n            .ToList();\n\n        var players = _seats.ToDictionary(\n            kv => kv.Key,\n            kv => new BlackjackSeatDTO(\n                Occupied: kv.Value.ClientId != null,\n                IsYou: kv.Value.ClientId == clientId,\n                Balance: kv.Value.Balance,\n                SelectedBet: kv.Value.SelectedBet,\n                CurrentBet: kv.Value.CurrentBet,\n                Hand: kv.Value.Hand.Select(c => new BlackjackCardDTO(c.Rank, c.Suit, c.Color, false)).ToList(),\n                Total: ScoreHand(kv.Value.Hand),\n                Stood: kv.Value.Stood,\n                Bust: kv.Value.Bust,\n                Blackjack: kv.Value.Blackjack,\n                Wins: kv.Value.Wins,\n                Losses: kv.Value.Losses,\n                Pushes: kv.Value.Pushes));\n\n        bool CanJoin(int n)\n        {\n            var takenByOther = _seats[n].ClientId != null && _seats[n].ClientId != clientId;\n            return !takenByOther\n                   && yourSeat != n\n                   && !(_soloMode && someoneSeated && _seats[n].ClientId == null)\n                   && !inActiveHand;\n        }\n\n        return new BlackjackStateDTO(\n            Version: _version,\n            Phase: _phase,\n            Status: _status,\n            SoloMode: _soloMode,\n            RevealDealer: _revealDealer,\n            TurnSeat: _turnSeat,\n            YourSeat: yourSeat,\n            DealerHand: dealerHand,\n            DealerTotal: _revealDealer ? ScoreHand(_dealerHand) : null,\n            LastRoundResults: new Dictionary<int, string?>(_lastRoundResults),\n            Players: players,\n            CanJoin1: CanJoin(1),\n            CanJoin2: CanJoin(2),\n            CanLeave: yourSeat != null && !inActiveHand,\n            CanToggleSolo: !inActiveHand,\n            CanReset: !inActiveHand,\n            CanSetBet: localPlayer != null && !inActiveHand,\n            CanDeal: localPlayer != null && SeatsReadyToDeal() && !inActiveHand,\n            CanHit: isMyTurn,\n            CanStand: isMyTurn,\n            CanDouble: isMyTurn && localPlayer!.Hand.Count == 2 && localPlayer.Balance >= localPlayer.CurrentBet);\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01EV9DXRsz28i5B1gt33Wy8W"}
{"session_id":"26bf0915-456a-4611-b67f-5374b0fc24c3","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/26bf0915-456a-4611-b67f-5374b0fc24c3.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"auto","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Controllers/Api/BlackjackApiController.cs","content":"using aspnet.Models.DTO;\nusing aspnet.Services;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Controllers.Api;\n\n// API za blackjack stol (wwwroot/kocka). Sva pravila igre su u\n// BlackjackTableService; svaki poziv vraća pogled personaliziran za clientId.\n[Route(\"api/blackjack\")]\n[ApiController]\npublic class BlackjackApiController : ControllerBase\n{\n    private readonly BlackjackTableService _table;\n\n    public BlackjackApiController(BlackjackTableService table) => _table = table;\n\n    public record BlackjackActionRequest(string? ClientId, int? Seat, int? Amount);\n\n    /// GET /api/blackjack/state?clientId=abc — polling za sinkronizaciju stola\n    [HttpGet(\"state\")]\n    public ActionResult<BlackjackStateDTO> State(string? clientId)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(clientId)) return BadRequest(new { error = \"clientId is required.\" });\n        return Ok(_table.GetState(clientId));\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost(\"join\")]\n    public ActionResult<BlackjackStateDTO> Join([FromBody] BlackjackActionRequest req)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(req.ClientId)) return BadRequest(new { error = \"clientId is required.\" });\n        if (req.Seat is not (1 or 2)) return BadRequest(new { error = \"seat must be 1 or 2.\" });\n        return Ok(_table.Join(req.ClientId, req.Seat.Value));\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost(\"leave\")]\n    public ActionResult<BlackjackStateDTO> Leave([FromBody] BlackjackActionRequest req)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(req.ClientId)) return BadRequest(new { error = \"clientId is required.\" });\n        return Ok(_table.Leave(req.ClientId));\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost(\"solo\")]\n    public ActionResult<BlackjackStateDTO> ToggleSolo([FromBody] BlackjackActionRequest req)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(req.ClientId)) return BadRequest(new { error = \"clientId is required.\" });\n        return Ok(_table.ToggleSolo(req.ClientId));\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost(\"reset\")]\n    public ActionResult<BlackjackStateDTO> Reset([FromBody] BlackjackActionRequest req)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(req.ClientId)) return BadRequest(new { error = \"clientId is required.\" });\n        return Ok(_table.Reset(req.ClientId));\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost(\"bet\")]\n    public ActionResult<BlackjackStateDTO> Bet([FromBody] BlackjackActionRequest req)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(req.ClientId)) return BadRequest(new { error = \"clientId is required.\" });\n        if (req.Amount is not > 0) return BadRequest(new { error = \"amount must be positive.\" });\n        return Ok(_table.SetBet(req.ClientId, req.Amount.Value));\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost(\"deal\")]\n    public ActionResult<BlackjackStateDTO> Deal([FromBody] BlackjackActionRequest req)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(req.ClientId)) return BadRequest(new { error = \"clientId is required.\" });\n        return Ok(_table.Deal(req.ClientId));\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost(\"hit\")]\n    public ActionResult<BlackjackStateDTO> Hit([FromBody] BlackjackActionRequest req)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(req.ClientId)) return BadRequest(new { error = \"clientId is required.\" });\n        return Ok(_table.Hit(req.ClientId));\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost(\"stand\")]\n    public ActionResult<BlackjackStateDTO> Stand([FromBody] BlackjackActionRequest req)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(req.ClientId)) return BadRequest(new { error = \"clientId is required.\" });\n        return Ok(_table.Stand(req.ClientId));\n    }\n\n    [HttpPost(\"double\")]\n    public ActionResult<BlackjackStateDTO> Double([FromBody] BlackjackActionRequest req)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(req.ClientId)) return BadRequest(new { error = \"clientId is required.\" });\n        return Ok(_table.Double(req.ClientId));\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_011tDeNx3AguBcjEJHSN67kF"}

I (the main agent) have just built a real server-side game engine and API. Your job: rewire the front-end to use it, keeping the GUI exactly as it is, and rename the game to \"Blackjack (NERV)\".\n\nProject root: /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet\n\nThe app is ALREADY RUNNING at http://localhost:5209 for your testing (don't start/stop it). The game page is http://localhost:5209/kocka/index.html.\n\nFiles you may touch (your domain): `aspnet/wwwroot/kocka/index.html`, `aspnet/wwwroot/kocka/script.js`, `aspnet/wwwroot/kocka/style.css` (avoid CSS changes — GUI must stay as-is), and `aspnet/Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml`. Do NOT touch controllers, services, models, or Program.cs.\n\n## Renames\n1. `_Layout.cshtml` line ~49: nav dropdown item text `Blackjack ↗` → `Blackjack (NERV) ↗`.\n2. `kocka/index.html`: `<title>Blackjack</title>` → `Blackjack (NERV)`, and the top-bar `<h1>Blackjack</h1>` → `Blackjack (NERV)`. Nothing else in the HTML structure changes (the JS targets the existing IDs).\n\n## API contract (all implemented, tested, and running)\n\nBase: `/api/blackjack` (same origin). Every endpoint returns the full personalized table state as JSON (camelCase). One shared table with 2 seats for everyone.\n\n- `GET /api/blackjack/state?clientId=<id>` — poll for sync (also acts as heartbeat; clients that stop polling get auto-stood after 60s on their turn and unseated after 120s idle).\n- `POST` endpoints, all with JSON body, `Content-Type: application/json`:\n  - `/join` body `{\"clientId\":\"...\",\"seat\":1}` (seat 1 or 2)\n  - `/leave` body `{\"clientId\":\"...\"}`\n  - `/solo` body `{\"clientId\":\"...\"}` (toggles solo mode)\n  - `/reset` body `{\"clientId\":\"...\"}`\n  - `/bet` body `{\"clientId\":\"...\",\"amount\":25}` (allowed: 25/50/100/200)\n  - `/deal`, `/hit`, `/stand`, `/double` body `{\"clientId\":\"...\"}`\n\nResponse shape (camelCase):\n```json\n{\n  \"version\": 42,\n  \"phase\": \"waiting\" | \"player-turns\" | \"dealer-turn\" | \"round-over\",\n  \"status\": \"Player 1's turn.\",\n  \"soloMode\": false,\n  \"revealDealer\": false,\n  \"turnSeat\": 1 | null,\n  \"yourSeat\": 1 | null,\n  \"dealerHand\": [ {\"rank\":\"8\",\"suit\":\"♠\",\"color\":\"black\",\"hidden\":false}, {\"rank\":null,\"suit\":null,\"color\":null,\"hidden\":true} ],\n  \"dealerTotal\": 20 | null,\n  \"lastRoundResults\": { \"1\": \"win\"|\"loss\"|\"push\"|null, \"2\": null },\n  \"players\": {\n    \"1\": { \"occupied\":true, \"isYou\":true, \"balance\":900, \"selectedBet\":100, \"currentBet\":100,\n           \"hand\":[{\"rank\":\"A\",\"suit\":\"♠\",\"color\":\"black\",\"hidden\":false}], \"total\":17,\n           \"stood\":false, \"bust\":false, \"blackjack\":false, \"wins\":0, \"losses\":1, \"pushes\":0 },\n    \"2\": { ... }\n  },\n  \"canJoin1\":true, \"canJoin2\":true, \"canLeave\":false, \"canToggleSolo\":true, \"canReset\":true,\n  \"canSetBet\":false, \"canDeal\":false, \"canHit\":false, \"canStand\":false, \"canDouble\":false\n}\n```\n\nKey points:\n- The dealer's hole card arrives as `{\"hidden\":true, rank/suit/color: null}` until `revealDealer` is true — render it as the face-down card (the existing `renderCard(card, hidden=true)` already draws a card back without needing rank/suit).\n- `dealerTotal` is `null` while hidden → display \"Total: ?\".\n- All `can*` flags are computed server-side — use them directly for button disabled states instead of re-deriving the rules locally.\n- Invalid/illegal actions don't error; the server just returns unchanged state with a status message.\n- 400 only for missing clientId / bad seat / bad amount.\n\n## script.js rewrite requirements\n\nKeep ALL of: the `ui` element map, every render/animation function (`renderCard`, `animateCardIn`, `animateCardCascade`, anime.js functions, etc.), `triggerActionFx`, the WebAudio `playSound` machinery, and the overall rendering behavior. The visual experience must be identical.\n\nReplace the game-logic layer:\n- Delete the local game engine: `makeDeck`, `shuffle`, `drawCard`, `scoreHand`, `isBlackjack`, `nextTurnSeat`, `seatsReadyToDeal`, `resolveRound`, `runDealerIfNeeded`, `advanceTurn`, `runMutation`, `loadOrCreateState`, `publishState`, localStorage/BroadcastChannel state sync — all of that now lives on the server.\n- Keep `clientId` generation but it's fine to keep using sessionStorage (`blackjack-multiplayer-client-id`) so a tab reload reclaims its seat (the server matches by clientId).\n- Maintain a `let serverState = null;` and a `render()` that draws from the server response. Mapping from old local state to new DTO:\n  - `state.players[seat].hand` → `serverState.players[seat].hand` (same card objects, plus `hidden` flag)\n  - totals: use `players[seat].total` and `dealerTotal` from the server instead of local `scoreHand`\n  - `localSeat` → `serverState.yourSeat`\n  - button disabled states ← the `can*` flags\n  - scoreboard (wins/losses/pushes), balance, bets ← from `players[yourSeat]`\n  - `lastRoundResults[yourSeat]` drives the YOU WIN / YOU LOSE / PUSH popup exactly as before\n  - seat status labels: `players[n].occupied`\n  - keep the \"Solo mode: press Deal when ready.\" status override when `phase===\"waiting\" && soloMode` and only one seat occupied, as the current code does.\n- Each button handler: keep `animateButtonPress` + `playSound`/`triggerActionFx` for the local action exactly as now, then `await` the API call and render the returned state.\n- Card animations: currently every render re-animates all cards. To keep the feel without re-triggering animations on every poll, only re-render hands when something changed — simplest reliable approach: track the last rendered `version` (and re-render only when `version` differs), or compare hand lengths/reveal flag to decide whether to animate. Your choice, but ensure polling doesn't make cards flicker/re-animate every 1.5s.\n- Multiplayer sync: poll `GET /state` every ~1500ms (replace BroadcastChannel/storage events). Skip overlapping requests (if one poll is in flight, don't start another). On fetch failure show a non-fatal status like \"Connection lost. Retrying…\" and keep polling.\n- `beforeunload`: replace the localStorage seat-release with `navigator.sendBeacon('/api/blackjack/leave', new Blob([JSON.stringify({clientId})], {type:'application/json'}))` — only when seated and not in an active hand (same condition as now).\n\n## Verify\nAfter the rewrite, exercise the API-driven flow yourself with curl (join → solo → bet → deal → hit/stand) and load http://localhost:5209/kocka/index.html (e.g. curl it) to sanity-check the page serves. If you have a way to check for JS syntax errors (e.g. `node --check script.js`), do it. Report what you changed and anything you couldn't verify.","subagent_type":"ux-designer"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_0141kP4eY4hfLrCUnxKhc1he"}

{"session_id":"26bf0915-456a-4611-b67f-5374b0fc24c3","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/26bf0915-456a-4611-b67f-5374b0fc24c3.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"auto","agent_id":"af9a909c6a5ce1f11","agent_type":"ux-designer","effort":{"level":"high"},"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/wwwroot/kocka/script.js","content":"const API_BASE = \"/api/blackjack\";\nconst CLIENT_KEY = \"blackjack-multiplayer-client-id\";\nconst POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 1500;\n\nfunction getOrCreateClientId() {\n  const existing = sessionStorage.getItem(CLIENT_KEY);\n  if (existing) {\n    return existing;\n  }\n  const created = `${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}-${Date.now().toString(36)}`;\n  sessionStorage.setItem(CLIENT_KEY, created);\n  return created;\n}\n\nconst localClientId = getOrCreateClientId();\nlet serverState = null;\nlet lastRenderedVersion = -1;\nlet lastRevealDealer = false;\nlet connectionLost = false;\nlet pollInFlight = false;\nlet audioContext;\n\nconst ui = {\n  dealerCards: document.getElementById(\"dealer-cards\"),\n  dealerTotal: document.getElementById(\"dealer-total\"),\n  status: document.getElementById(\"status\"),\n  roundResult: document.getElementById(\"round-result\"),\n  hitBtn: document.getElementById(\"hit-btn\"),\n  standBtn: document.getElementById(\"stand-btn\"),\n  doubleBtn: document.getElementById(\"double-btn\"),\n  dealBtn: document.getElementById(\"new-game-btn\"),\n  wins: document.getElementById(\"wins\"),\n  losses: document.getElementById(\"losses\"),\n  pushes: document.getElementById(\"pushes\"),\n  balance: document.getElementById(\"balance\"),\n  betDisplay: document.getElementById(\"bet-display\"),\n  chips: Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(\".chip\")),\n  playerAreas: {\n    1: {\n      container: document.getElementById(\"player-1-cards\")?.closest(\".player-area\"),\n      label: document.getElementById(\"player-1-label\"),\n      total: document.getElementById(\"player-1-total\"),\n      meta: document.getElementById(\"player-1-meta\"),\n      cards: document.getElementById(\"player-1-cards\"),\n    },\n    2: {\n      container: document.getElementById(\"player-2-cards\")?.closest(\".player-area\"),\n      label: document.getElementById(\"player-2-label\"),\n      total: document.getElementById(\"player-2-total\"),\n      meta: document.getElementById(\"player-2-meta\"),\n      cards: document.getElementById(\"player-2-cards\"),\n    },\n  },\n  playersGrid: document.querySelector(\".players-grid\"),\n  youAre: document.getElementById(\"you-are\"),\n  seat1Status: document.getElementById(\"seat-1-status\"),\n  seat2Status: document.getElementById(\"seat-2-status\"),\n  joinSeat1Btn: document.getElementById(\"join-seat-1\"),\n  joinSeat2Btn: document.getElementById(\"join-seat-2\"),\n  leaveSeatBtn: document.getElementById(\"leave-seat\"),\n  soloModeBtn: document.getElementById(\"solo-mode-btn\"),\n  resetTableBtn: document.getElementById(\"reset-table-btn\"),\n  vfxLayer: document.getElementById(\"vfx-layer\"),\n};\n\n// ============================================\n// SERVER API LAYER\n// ============================================\n\nasync function apiGetState() {\n  const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/state?clientId=${encodeURIComponent(localClientId)}`, {\n    headers: { Accept: \"application/json\" },\n  });\n  if (!res.ok) {\n    throw new Error(`GET state failed: ${res.status}`);\n  }\n  return res.json();\n}\n\nasync function apiPost(action, extra = {}) {\n  const res = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/${action}`, {\n    method: \"POST\",\n    headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", Accept: \"application/json\" },\n    body: JSON.stringify({ clientId: localClientId, ...extra }),\n  });\n  if (!res.ok) {\n    throw new Error(`POST ${action} failed: ${res.status}`);\n  }\n  return res.json();\n}\n\nfunction handleConnectionError(error) {\n  console.error(\"Blackjack server error:\", error);\n  connectionLost = true;\n  setStatus(\"Connection lost. Retrying…\", true);\n}\n\nfunction applyServerState(state) {\n  if (connectionLost) {\n    connectionLost = false;\n    lastRenderedVersion = -1; // force re-render to restore real status text\n  }\n  serverState = state;\n  render();\n}\n\nasync function sendAction(action, extra, sound) {\n  if (sound) {\n    playSound(sound);\n    triggerActionFx(sound);\n  }\n  try {\n    const state = await apiPost(action, extra);\n    applyServerState(state);\n  } catch (error) {\n    handleConnectionError(error);\n  }\n}\n\nasync function pollState() {\n  if (pollInFlight) {\n    return;\n  }\n  pollInFlight = true;\n  try {\n    const state = await apiGetState();\n    applyServerState(state);\n  } catch (error) {\n    handleConnectionError(error);\n  } finally {\n    pollInFlight = false;\n  }\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// RENDERING\n// ============================================\n\nfunction renderCard(card, hidden = false) {\n  const cardEl = document.createElement(\"div\");\n  cardEl.className = `card${hidden ? \" back\" : \"\"}${card.color === \"red\" && !hidden ? \" red\" : \"\"}`;\n  if (hidden) {\n    cardEl.innerHTML = '<span class=\"rank\">?</span><span class=\"suit\">◆</span>';\n    return cardEl;\n  }\n  cardEl.innerHTML = `<span class=\"rank\">${card.rank}</span><span class=\"suit\">${card.suit}</span>`;\n  return cardEl;\n}\n\nfunction setStatus(text, danger = false) {\n  ui.status.textContent = text;\n  ui.status.classList.toggle(\"danger\", danger);\n  ui.status.classList.remove(\"pulse\");\n  animateStatusPulse(ui.status);\n  void ui.status.offsetWidth;\n  ui.status.classList.add(\"pulse\");\n}\n\nfunction triggerActionFx(kind) {\n  if (!ui.vfxLayer || ![\"deal\", \"hit\", \"stand\", \"double\"].includes(kind)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const config = {\n    deal: { count: 120, color: \"#70ff3a\", spread: 360, flash: \"flash-deal\", waves: 2, words: [\"SYNC\", \"READY\", \"ARMED\"] },\n    hit: { count: 90, color: \"#b4ff66\", spread: 310, flash: \"flash-hit\", waves: 2, words: [\"IMPACT\", \"BREACH\", \"PULSE\"] },\n    stand: { count: 66, color: \"#ff952a\", spread: 270, flash: \"flash-stand\", waves: 1, words: [\"LOCK\", \"HOLD\", \"GUARD\"] },\n    double: { count: 180, color: \"#ff53b8\", spread: 520, flash: \"flash-double\", waves: 3, words: [\"BERSERK\", \"OVERDRIVE\", \"MAX POWER\"] },\n  }[kind];\n\n  const rect = ui.vfxLayer.getBoundingClientRect();\n  const centerX = rect.width * (0.35 + Math.random() * 0.3);\n  const centerY = rect.height * (0.35 + Math.random() * 0.3);\n\n  const spawnBurst = (wave = 1) => {\n    const waveScale = 1 + wave * 0.2;\n    for (let i = 0; i < config.count; i += 1) {\n      const piece = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;\n      const speed = (95 + Math.random() * config.spread) * waveScale;\n      const size = 4 + Math.random() * 14;\n      piece.className = \"fx-particle\";\n      piece.style.setProperty(\"--fx-x\", `${centerX}px`);\n      piece.style.setProperty(\"--fx-y\", `${centerY}px`);\n      piece.style.setProperty(\"--fx-dx\", `${Math.cos(angle) * speed}`);\n      piece.style.setProperty(\"--fx-dy\", `${Math.sin(angle) * speed}`);\n      piece.style.setProperty(\"--fx-color\", config.color);\n      piece.style.width = `${size}px`;\n      piece.style.height = `${size}px`;\n      piece.style.opacity = `${0.5 + Math.random() * 0.5}`;\n      ui.vfxLayer.appendChild(piece);\n      setTimeout(() => piece.remove(), 900);\n    }\n\n    const ring = document.createElement(\"span\");\n    ring.className = \"fx-ring\";\n    ring.style.setProperty(\"--fx-x\", `${centerX}px`);\n    ring.style.setProperty(\"--fx-y\", `${centerY}px`);\n    ring.style.setProperty(\"--fx-color\", config.color);\n    ui.vfxLayer.appendChild(ring);\n    setTimeout(() => ring.remove(), 780);\n\n    const shardCount = 8 + wave * 4;\n    for (let i = 0; i < shardCount; i += 1) {\n      const shard = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      const driftX = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 340;\n      const driftY = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 200;\n      shard.className = \"fx-shard\";\n      shard.style.setProperty(\"--fx-x\", `${centerX}px`);\n      shard.style.setProperty(\"--fx-y\", `${centerY}px`);\n      shard.style.setProperty(\"--fx-dx\", `${driftX}`);\n      shard.style.setProperty(\"--fx-dy\", `${driftY}`);\n      shard.style.setProperty(\"--fx-color\", config.color);\n      shard.style.transform = `translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(${Math.random() * 360}deg)`;\n      ui.vfxLayer.appendChild(shard);\n      setTimeout(() => shard.remove(), 860);\n    }\n  };\n\n  for (let wave = 0; wave < config.waves; wave += 1) {\n    setTimeout(() => spawnBurst(wave), wave * 90);\n  }\n\n  const word = document.createElement(\"span\");\n  word.className = \"fx-banner\";\n  word.textContent = config.words[Math.floor(Math.random() * config.words.length)];\n  word.style.setProperty(\"--fx-color\", config.color);\n  word.style.left = `${Math.max(16, centerX - 120)}px`;\n  word.style.top = `${Math.max(16, centerY - 28)}px`;\n  ui.vfxLayer.appendChild(word);\n  setTimeout(() => word.remove(), 720);\n\n  document.body.classList.remove(\"action-flash\", \"flash-deal\", \"flash-hit\", \"flash-stand\", \"flash-double\");\n  document.body.classList.remove(\"action-shake\", \"action-glitch\", \"action-overdrive\", \"action-strobe\", \"action-tilt\");\n  void document.body.offsetWidth;\n  document.body.classList.add(\n    \"action-flash\",\n    config.flash,\n    \"action-shake\",\n    \"action-glitch\",\n    \"action-overdrive\",\n    \"action-strobe\",\n    \"action-tilt\"\n  );\n  setTimeout(() => {\n    document.body.classList.remove(\n      \"action-flash\",\n      config.flash,\n      \"action-shake\",\n      \"action-glitch\",\n      \"action-overdrive\",\n      \"action-strobe\",\n      \"action-tilt\"\n    );\n  }, kind === \"double\" ? 980 : 680);\n}\n\nfunction render() {\n  if (!serverState) {\n    return;\n  }\n  // Only re-render (and re-animate cards) when the server state actually changed,\n  // so the 1.5s poll never makes cards flicker or replay animations.\n  if (serverState.version === lastRenderedVersion) {\n    return;\n  }\n  lastRenderedVersion = serverState.version;\n\n  const revealJustHappened = serverState.revealDealer && !lastRevealDealer;\n  lastRevealDealer = serverState.revealDealer;\n\n  const yourSeat = serverState.yourSeat;\n  const localPlayer = yourSeat ? serverState.players[yourSeat] : null;\n  const occupiedSeats = [1, 2].filter((seat) => Boolean(serverState.players[seat]?.occupied));\n  const isSinglePlayerLayout = occupiedSeats.length === 1;\n\n  ui.youAre.textContent = yourSeat ? `You are: Player ${yourSeat}` : \"You are: Spectator\";\n  ui.seat1Status.textContent = `Seat 1: ${serverState.players[1]?.occupied ? \"Occupied\" : \"Open\"}`;\n  ui.seat2Status.textContent = `Seat 2: ${serverState.players[2]?.occupied ? \"Occupied\" : \"Open\"}`;\n  ui.soloModeBtn.textContent = `Solo Mode: ${serverState.soloMode ? \"On\" : \"Off\"}`;\n\n  // Button availability comes straight from the server's can* flags.\n  ui.joinSeat1Btn.disabled = !serverState.canJoin1;\n  ui.joinSeat2Btn.disabled = !serverState.canJoin2;\n  ui.leaveSeatBtn.disabled = !serverState.canLeave;\n  ui.soloModeBtn.disabled = !serverState.canToggleSolo;\n  ui.resetTableBtn.disabled = !serverState.canReset;\n\n  ui.dealerCards.innerHTML = \"\";\n  serverState.dealerHand.forEach((card, index) => {\n    const hidden = Boolean(card.hidden);\n    const cardEl = renderCard(card, hidden);\n    ui.dealerCards.appendChild(cardEl);\n    animateCardIn(cardEl);\n    if (!hidden && index === 1 && revealJustHappened) {\n      setTimeout(() => animateDealerReveal(cardEl), 300);\n    }\n  });\n  ui.dealerTotal.textContent = serverState.dealerTotal !== null && serverState.dealerTotal !== undefined\n    ? `Total: ${serverState.dealerTotal}`\n    : \"Total: ?\";\n\n  [1, 2].forEach((seat) => {\n    const player = serverState.players[seat];\n    const area = ui.playerAreas[seat];\n    if (!player || !area) {\n      return;\n    }\n    area.cards.innerHTML = \"\";\n    const cardElements = [];\n    (player.hand || []).forEach((card) => {\n      const cardEl = renderCard(card, Boolean(card.hidden));\n      area.cards.appendChild(cardEl);\n      cardElements.push(cardEl);\n    });\n    if (cardElements.length > 0) {\n      animateCardCascade(cardElements);\n    }\n\n    const youTag = seat === yourSeat ? \" (You)\" : \"\";\n    area.label.textContent = `Player ${seat}${youTag}`;\n    area.total.textContent = `Total: ${player.hand?.length ? player.total ?? 0 : 0}`;\n    area.meta.textContent = `Bal: $${player.balance ?? 0} | Bet: $${player.selectedBet ?? 0} | In: $${player.currentBet ?? 0}`;\n    area.container?.classList.toggle(\"is-hidden\", isSinglePlayerLayout && !player.occupied);\n  });\n  ui.playersGrid?.classList.toggle(\"single-player\", isSinglePlayerLayout);\n\n  ui.wins.textContent = `Wins: ${localPlayer ? localPlayer.wins : 0}`;\n  ui.losses.textContent = `Losses: ${localPlayer ? localPlayer.losses : 0}`;\n  ui.pushes.textContent = `Pushes: ${localPlayer ? localPlayer.pushes : 0}`;\n  ui.balance.textContent = `Balance: ${localPlayer ? `$${localPlayer.balance}` : \"-\"}`;\n  if (localPlayer) {\n    animateBalanceChange(ui.balance);\n  }\n  ui.betDisplay.textContent = `Your Bet: ${localPlayer ? `$${localPlayer.selectedBet}` : \"-\"}`;\n\n  const localResult = yourSeat ? serverState.lastRoundResults?.[yourSeat] : null;\n  if (serverState.phase === \"round-over\" && localResult && ui.roundResult) {\n    const label = localResult === \"win\" ? \"YOU WIN\" : localResult === \"push\" ? \"PUSH\" : \"YOU LOSE\";\n    ui.roundResult.textContent = label;\n    ui.roundResult.className = `round-result ${localResult}`;\n    animateRoundResult(ui.roundResult);\n  } else if (ui.roundResult) {\n    ui.roundResult.textContent = \"\";\n    ui.roundResult.className = \"round-result hidden\";\n  }\n\n  ui.chips.forEach((chip) => {\n    const chipValue = Number(chip.dataset.bet);\n    chip.classList.toggle(\"active\", Boolean(localPlayer && localPlayer.selectedBet === chipValue));\n    chip.disabled = !serverState.canSetBet;\n  });\n\n  ui.dealBtn.disabled = !serverState.canDeal;\n  ui.hitBtn.disabled = !serverState.canHit;\n  ui.standBtn.disabled = !serverState.canStand;\n  ui.doubleBtn.disabled = !serverState.canDouble;\n\n  if (serverState.phase === \"waiting\" && serverState.soloMode && isSinglePlayerLayout) {\n    setStatus(\"Solo mode: press Deal when ready.\", false);\n  } else if (serverState.status) {\n    setStatus(serverState.status, false);\n  }\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// PLAYER ACTIONS (server-backed)\n// ============================================\n\nfunction joinSeat(seat) {\n  sendAction(\"join\", { seat }, \"button\");\n}\n\nfunction leaveSeat() {\n  sendAction(\"leave\", {}, \"button\");\n}\n\nfunction toggleSoloMode() {\n  sendAction(\"solo\", {}, \"button\");\n}\n\nfunction resetTable() {\n  sendAction(\"reset\", {}, \"button\");\n}\n\nfunction setBet(amount) {\n  sendAction(\"bet\", { amount: Number(amount) }, \"button\");\n}\n\nfunction startRound() {\n  sendAction(\"deal\", {}, \"deal\");\n}\n\nfunction hit() {\n  sendAction(\"hit\", {}, \"hit\");\n}\n\nfunction stand() {\n  sendAction(\"stand\", {}, \"stand\");\n}\n\nfunction doubleDown() {\n  sendAction(\"double\", {}, \"double\");\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// AUDIO\n// ============================================\n\nfunction ensureAudioContext() {\n  if (!window.AudioContext && !window.webkitAudioContext) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  if (!audioContext) {\n    const AudioCtor = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;\n    audioContext = new AudioCtor();\n  }\n  if (audioContext.state === \"suspended\") {\n    audioContext.resume();\n  }\n  return audioContext;\n}\n\nfunction playTone(freq, duration, type = \"sine\", volume = 0.05, delay = 0) {\n  const ctx = ensureAudioContext();\n  if (!ctx) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const osc = ctx.createOscillator();\n  const gain = ctx.createGain();\n  const startAt = ctx.currentTime + delay;\n  const endAt = startAt + duration;\n  osc.type = type;\n  osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, startAt);\n  gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, startAt);\n  gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(volume, startAt + 0.01);\n  gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, endAt);\n  osc.connect(gain);\n  gain.connect(ctx.destination);\n  osc.start(startAt);\n  osc.stop(endAt + 0.01);\n}\n\nfunction playSound(kind) {\n  if (kind === \"deal\") {\n    playTone(190, 0.09, \"square\", 0.06);\n    playTone(280, 0.1, \"square\", 0.055, 0.06);\n    playTone(420, 0.1, \"triangle\", 0.05, 0.12);\n  } else if (kind === \"hit\") {\n    playTone(140, 0.06, \"sawtooth\", 0.06);\n    playTone(320, 0.08, \"triangle\", 0.05, 0.05);\n    playTone(520, 0.06, \"square\", 0.04, 0.12);\n  } else if (kind === \"stand\") {\n    playTone(160, 0.12, \"sine\", 0.06);\n    playTone(130, 0.18, \"triangle\", 0.04, 0.1);\n  } else if (kind === \"double\") {\n    playTone(120, 0.08, \"sawtooth\", 0.08);\n    playTone(240, 0.08, \"square\", 0.07, 0.05);\n    playTone(350, 0.09, \"triangle\", 0.06, 0.1);\n    playTone(520, 0.1, \"sawtooth\", 0.06, 0.16);\n    playTone(740, 0.14, \"triangle\", 0.04, 0.24);\n  } else if (kind === \"button\") {\n    playTone(430, 0.05, \"triangle\", 0.03);\n  }\n}\n\n// ============================================\n// EVENT WIRING\n// ============================================\n\nui.joinSeat1Btn.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n  animateButtonPress(ui.joinSeat1Btn);\n  joinSeat(1);\n});\nui.joinSeat2Btn.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n  animateButtonPress(ui.joinSeat2Btn);\n  joinSeat(2);\n});\nui.leaveSeatBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n  animateButtonPress(ui.leaveSeatBtn);\n  leaveSeat();\n});\nui.soloModeBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n  animateButtonPress(ui.soloModeBtn);\n  toggleSoloMode();\n});\nui.resetTableBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n  animateButtonPress(ui.resetTableBtn);\n  resetTable();\n});\nui.dealBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n  animateButtonPress(ui.dealBtn);\n  animateButtonGlow(ui.dealBtn);\n  startRound();\n});\nui.hitBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n  animateButtonPress(ui.hitBtn);\n  hit();\n});\nui.standBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n  animateButtonPress(ui.standBtn);\n  stand();\n});\nui.doubleBtn.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n  animateButtonPress(ui.doubleBtn);\n  doubleDown();\n});\nui.chips.forEach((chip) => {\n  chip.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n    animateChipSelect(chip);\n    setBet(chip.dataset.bet);\n  });\n});\n\nwindow.addEventListener(\"beforeunload\", () => {\n  if (!serverState || !serverState.yourSeat) {\n    return;\n  }\n  if (serverState.phase === \"player-turns\" || serverState.phase === \"dealer-turn\") {\n    return;\n  }\n  navigator.sendBeacon(\n    `${API_BASE}/leave`,\n    new Blob([JSON.stringify({ clientId: localClientId })], { type: \"application/json\" })\n  );\n});\n\n// Initial sync + multiplayer polling (also serves as the server heartbeat).\npollState();\nsetInterval(pollState, POLL_INTERVAL_MS);\n\n// ============================================\n// ANIME.JS ANIMATION FUNCTIONS\n// ============================================\n\n// Animate card entrance\nfunction animateCardIn(cardElement) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime.set(cardElement, {\n    opacity: 0,\n    translateY: 30,\n    rotate: -15,\n  });\n  anime({\n    targets: cardElement,\n    opacity: 1,\n    translateY: 0,\n    rotate: 0,\n    duration: 450,\n    easing: \"easeOutElastic(1, .6)\",\n    delay: Math.random() * 100,\n  });\n}\n\n// Animate card flip\nfunction animateCardFlip(cardElement) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: cardElement,\n    rotateY: [0, 180],\n    duration: 400,\n    easing: \"easeInOutQuad\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Animate button click/press\nfunction animateButtonPress(buttonElement) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: buttonElement,\n    scale: [1, 0.95, 1],\n    duration: 200,\n    easing: \"easeOutQuad\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Animate status text pulse\nfunction animateStatusPulse(statusElement) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: statusElement,\n    opacity: [1, 0.5, 1],\n    scale: [1, 1.05, 1],\n    duration: 600,\n    easing: \"easeInOutQuad\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Animate round result popup with bounce\nfunction animateRoundResult(resultElement) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime.set(resultElement, {\n    scale: 0.5,\n    opacity: 0,\n    rotate: -180,\n  });\n  anime({\n    targets: resultElement,\n    scale: [0.5, 1.15, 1],\n    opacity: 1,\n    rotate: 0,\n    duration: 700,\n    easing: \"easeOutElastic(1, .7)\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Animate chip active state\nfunction animateChipSelect(chipElement) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: chipElement,\n    scale: [1, 1.2, 1],\n    duration: 300,\n    easing: \"easeOutBack\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Animate balance change\nfunction animateBalanceChange(balanceElement) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: balanceElement,\n    scale: [1, 1.15, 1],\n    duration: 400,\n    easing: \"easeOutQuad\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Animate player area highlight\nfunction animatePlayerHighlight(playerArea) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: playerArea,\n    borderColor: [\"rgba(112, 255, 58, 0.2)\", \"rgba(112, 255, 58, 0.8)\", \"rgba(112, 255, 58, 0.2)\"],\n    duration: 500,\n    easing: \"easeInOutQuad\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Animate blackjack celebration\nfunction animateBlackjackWin(element) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: element,\n    scale: [1, 1.25, 1],\n    rotate: [0, 10, -10, 0],\n    duration: 800,\n    easing: \"easeOutElastic(1, .6)\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Animate dealer card reveal\nfunction animateDealerReveal(cardElement) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: cardElement,\n    rotateY: [180, 0],\n    duration: 500,\n    easing: \"easeOutQuad\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Animate hand total increase\nfunction animateTotalIncrease(totalElement) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: totalElement,\n    scale: [1, 1.2, 1],\n    color: [\"#ff952a\", \"#70ff3a\", \"#ff952a\"],\n    duration: 400,\n    easing: \"easeOutQuad\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Animate bust shake\nfunction animateBustShake(playerArea) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: playerArea,\n    translateX: [-8, 8, -8, 8, 0],\n    duration: 400,\n    easing: \"easeInOutQuad\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Animate smooth panel transitions\nfunction animatePanelSlideIn(panelElement) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime.set(panelElement, {\n    opacity: 0,\n    translateX: -30,\n  });\n  anime({\n    targets: panelElement,\n    opacity: 1,\n    translateX: 0,\n    duration: 500,\n    easing: \"easeOutQuad\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Smooth color transition for status states\nfunction animateStatusColor(statusElement, newColor) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: statusElement,\n    color: newColor,\n    duration: 400,\n    easing: \"easeOutQuad\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Glow/pulse effect for active buttons\nfunction animateButtonGlow(buttonElement) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: buttonElement,\n    boxShadow: [\n      \"0 0 16px rgba(112, 255, 58, 0.24)\",\n      \"0 0 32px rgba(112, 255, 58, 0.6)\",\n      \"0 0 16px rgba(112, 255, 58, 0.24)\",\n    ],\n    duration: 800,\n    easing: \"easeInOutQuad\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Cascade effect for multiple cards\nfunction animateCardCascade(cardElements) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: cardElements,\n    opacity: [0, 1],\n    translateY: [40, 0],\n    rotate: [-20, 0],\n    delay: anime.stagger(80),\n    duration: 500,\n    easing: \"easeOutElastic(1, .6)\",\n  });\n}\n\n// Bounce effect for seat status changes\nfunction animateSeatBounce(seatElement) {\n  if (!window.anime) return;\n  anime({\n    targets: seatElement,\n    translateY: [0, -8, 0],\n    duration: 400,\n    easing: \"easeOutQuad\",\n  });\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_015CsviPuRPeNCcQS7xT4yND"}
